title: Operation: Flush the Shard
text: Operation: Flush the Shard Operation: Flush The Shard Objective: Prevent Shard #1, “Awareness” from moving closer to San Francisco and instead redirect it closer to Agentina. Agent Credits PreEvent Event Timeline Outcome Photos Agent Credits John Asselin (Submarginals) - Next hop and Shard portal capture/defense Dwayne Coleman (Delier) - Shard portal capture/defense Zachery Beach (Vegasmaize) - Shard portal capture/defense Stephen Dahlquist II (ToadSmasher) - Shard portal capture/defense William Olsen (FirstDegree) - Shard portal capture/defense Adam Wilson (EVILoptimist) - Shard portal capture/defense Dara Champion (DChamp) - Shard portal capture/defense James Barker (sunvalleyopi) - Shard portal capture/defense Karston Watkins (00nerspism) - Shard portal capture/defense Chris Xedis (xedis) - Shard portal capture/defense Justin Pulsipher (ArrMiHardies) - Shard portal capture/defense Kimberly Burgess (Kimmie) - Shard portal capture/defense Jennifer Wolff (JennyWeb) - Shard portal capture/defense Matt Esposito (FreakSociety) - Shard portal capture/defense Shane Bement (PrinceRobotIV) - Shard portal capture/defense Miguel Castillo (BlueKnightWing) - Shard portal capture/defense Paul Walters (Deaglan421) - Shard portal capture/defense Dee VeeEss (BigDevious) - Shard portal capture/defense Tru Ives (SonicLust) - Shard portal capture/defense Jason Gilenson (SHADOW702) - Shard portal capture/defense Resistance Leaders from the west who provided Intel Op Support and Planning Numerous supporters from around the world who sent encouraging messages PreEvent FirstDegree is actively participating in Shard #1 monitoring with other leaders from the SouthWest. Shard has been moved to Austin, TX; however, it looks like Resistance have it under control and a plan is in place to move it the appropriate direction, closer to Argentina. Event Timeline All timing below is approximate pst. Monday, November 18, 2013 19:00 Agent FirstDegree is enroute from Las Vegas to the St. George, UT for personal reasons when he receives notification that the Enlightened have managed to get control of Shard #1 and have moved it to the St. George Area. 19:15: FirstDegree notifies St. George and Las Vegas Resistance Agents that the Shard is in our area and makes arrangements to meet St. George agents near the Shard as soon as he can arrive. 19:30: FirstDegree stops in Mesquite, NV and puts a blocking link in place between Mesquite, NV and Wendover, NV. Effectively blocking nearly the entire NV/UT border, preventing further movement of the Shard to the West. He continues on his way to Utah. 20:00: The Enlightened move the Shard from Hole in the Wall to Southern Exploring Company in Hurricane, UT. 20:30: Agents Submarginals and ArrMiHardies perform Intel Op functions to determine that with a little local clearing, there’s a clear link path available to link from Hurricane, UT to a portal in Nipton, CA. Putting it firmly in Las Vegas Resistance hands. Submarginals is dispatched to travel to Nipton to receive the Shard with the assumption Agents on site in Utah will be able to move it. 20:50: Agents EVILoptimist, DChamp, sunvalleyopi, and FirstDegree arrive at the portal. FirstDegree attempts to use an ADA Refractor to take the flip option off the table at the top of the hour; however, the flip card fails for unknown reason. The four Resistance Agents instead initiate an attack on the portal with two Enlightened Agents defending. The Resistance is able to take control of the portal at 20:55. 20:58: A Jarvis virus is successfully used by the Enlightened returning the portal to their hands. They establish a link to another portal. The Resistance resumes their attack drop the link at 20:59 and regain control at 21:00 exactly. The battle continues with the Enlightened trying to regain control with the Resistance defending through 21:01 at which point both sides halt further action. 21:10: With the Resistance firmly in control of the portal, one Enlightened agent leaves the portal to place blocking links in Hurricane to prevent Resistance movement. 21:30: EVILOptimist is dispatched to clear the blocking links to allow a Shard movement at 22:00. 21:50: ArrMiHardies is prepared in Las Vegas to drop blue blocking links to allow a Shard movement at 22:00. 22:00: Green blocking links remain in place preventing Resistance movement. Agents from both factions listed above return and both factions actively fight over the Shard portal from 21:55 through 22:00. Resistance continues to hold control of the portal. EVILoptimist again is dispatched to clear remaining blocking links. 22:57: Blocking links having been successfully cleared, FirstDegree successfully links from the Shard portal to the Nipton, CA portal. The two Enlightened Agents attempt to use another Jarvis, which fails. They have to resort to a standard attack. Resistance is able to hold the link in place until 2 seconds before the Shard jump, when the Enlightened successfully knock off the link; however, are unable to take possession of the portal. Battle subsides at 23:01. Submarginals continues to wait in Nipton. sunvalleyopi has to leave and is replaced by 00nerspism. 23:30: With both groups of agents sitting in adjacent vehicles, the Resistance Agents identify they are missing something. 00nerspism walks over to the Enlightened vehicle and knocks on the window to ask, “Do you have any Grey Poupon?”. 23:58 The Enlightened begin their attack. The Resistance defend while FirstDegree having expended his one Nipton key, attempts to link to Mineral Park instead with the expectation Submarginals will then link from Nipton to Mineral Park to further the Shard. The link while showing “Link Established” with the animation in the client fades and fails to move the Shard even though ownership of at least three resonators on the portal was retained through the attack and the key is missing from Inventory. The battle again subsides around 00:02. Tuesday, November 19, 2013 00:20: EVILoptimist identifies that FirstDegree had given him a Nipton key in the past. They will attempt to link to Nipton at 01:00. One of the Enlightned agents has to leave leaving the portal defended by a single defender. 00:55: FirstDegree again attempts to place the link to Nipton. Link fails with the same symptoms as before, he then attempts to link to Mineral Park and Chloride, both fail. 00:58: The Enlightened begin their attack residing at 01:02. Resistance again retain possession of the portal, but are unable to form links. 01:37: Agents Vegasmaize, xedis, and ToadSmasher plan to leave Las Vegas to travel to Hurricane for the next shift or to help with defense to allow the link to be made. 01:55: EVILoptimist attempts to form the link, but has the same problem. 01:58: Enlightened begin their attack. The Resistance attempt a new defense strategy and are able to hold the portal without losing a single resonator (they suspect the Enlightened are short are high level resources) through the entire attack with it subsiding at 02:02. 02:10: Resistance have Agents DChamp and 00nerspism also attempt to link to various nearby local portals without blocks, but get the same result. Client shows “Link Established”; however, it then immediately fades without the link actually showing up. Resistance Agents approach the Enlightened Agent on site. They notify him, they’ll let him take the portal for the purpose of attempting to link to see if it will work. He takes the portal and attempts to link to a local green portal and also fails. FirstDegree makes a video showing the problem and posts it on G+. All agents leave the scene having determined something is “broken” with the Shard portal. Submarginals leaves Nipton. 03:00: FirstDegree travels to another portal in the area and attempts to link back to the Shard portal. Receives the same problem. 03:10: Vegasmaize, ToadSmasher, and xedis depart Vegas for the Hurricane Portal. 05:27: They arrive at the Shard portal. 05:50: Vegasmaize attempts the Nipton link and gets the same error. ToadSmasher attempts a link and also fails. 05:55:: xedis attempts to link to Wellspring in Boulder City, NV and is successful. 06:00: The Shard moves to the Wellspring portal. 06:20: All Vegas Agents: Vegasmaize, ToadSmasher, xedis, and FirstDegree begin return trip to Las Vegas area as they race for Boulder City. 06:30: Various Vegas Area Agents take on the Intel Operator role to identify all blocking links to get it to Nipton. 07:30: FirstDegree stops in Mesquite again to place a East/West blocking link to Beatty, NV. 08:10: The determination is made to send the Shard to Moapa instead of Nipton as there are currently no blocking links. 08:25: ArrMiHardies arrives on site at Boulder City. Upon arrival he attempts to use a Jarvis on four nearby portals to clear a path to Nipton. Three work; however, the fourth fails for unknown reason. A Jarvis does work on it later in the day. 08:30: Submarginals departs for Moapa. 08:45: Two Enlightened Agents arrive on site at Boulder City. 08:50: Vegasmaize, ToadSmasher, and xedis arrive on site at Boulder City. 08:55: FirstDegree arrives on site at Boulder City. 08:58: Enlightened begin their attack, the Resistance while outnumbering them 5 to 2 are unable to maintain the link due to server lag. The attack halts at 09:01. 09:30: BlueKnightWing arrives on site at Boulder City. 09:45: An additional Enlightened Agent arrives to help. 09:58: Enlightened Agents begin their attack with a similar result that the Resistance are unable to maintain the link. The battle terminates at 10:02. 09:30: ToadSmasher needs to depart, but takes keys to distribute to additional Vegas agents to help with recharging.. 09:40: Additional Enlightened Agents continue to arrive. 9:55: The Resistance attempt the link with multiple agents failing. Link is established; however, Enlightened are able to knock it down beginning their attack at 9:57 and having the link down by 10:00. 10:58: The Resistance establish the link; however, are unable to maintain it through the Enlightened attack which subsides at 11:01. 11:10: FirstDegree departs the scene to work and for a planned vacation in the evening, but also takes keys for distribution for recharging assistance. PrinceRobotIV arrives. 11:30: A decision is made to allow the Enlightened to capture the portal with the intent the Resistance will ADA the portal just prior to noon and throw the desired link. 11:59: Portal is flipped; however, link fails to establish as it was the night before. Battle ends at 12:02. 12:58: Battle resumes and ends with the same result. New agents arriving on scene can sometimes create a link; however, existing agents continually get the linking problem. Battle ends at 13:01. A count in the COMM log of the number of resonators deployed during the 3 minute battle is 175. Fortunately, the Resistance is well stocked having maintained L8 farms for the previous months. 13:58: Pattern continues to repeat itself. Vegasmaize needs to depart as does xedis. Delier arrives. 14:30: BlueKnightWing leaves to recharge from the strip in an xm rich environment. 14:58: Link established; however, with server lag it is impossible to hold through the attacks. Resistance decides that following this attempt, instead of attempting to link, they’ll take a retention approach instead and create blocking links to contain the shard and prevent Enlightened movement. It is clear it is going to be a battle of attrition. Heated battle ends at 15:02. 15:10: Submarginals throws blocking links from Moapa to the West and Southeast and departs the location. 15:56: Resistance continue to maintain ownership of the portal, but no longer worry about trying to link. Battle ends at 16:01. 16:20: SonicLust arrives on site. 16:55: Resistance continue their hold strategy and maintain ownership of the portal through the 17:00 battle. 17:10: All Resistance agents not on-site embark on creating blocking links to contain the Shard, but still allow linking to Nipton. ArrMiHardies needs to leave. Only two resistance agents remain on-site to battle the now nine Enlightened agents. 17:58: Resistance agents concede ownership of the portal; however, successfully prevent the Enlightened from being able to move the Shard. Battle ends at 18:02. 18:15: Additional Enlightened arrive on site. 18:58: Resistance agents prevent the Enlightened from successfully linking at the top of the hour. 19:10: Kimmie and JennyWeb arrive on site. 19:58: FreakSociety arrives on-site and assists Resistance agents in preventing an Enlightened move. It was very close, but the Resistance agents take down the link. 20:10: SHADOW702 is on site. 20:47: ArrMiHardies links Sloan to Laughlin preventing links to the Southwest. 20:58: The Enlightened attempt to move the Shard, but are again thwarted by the Resistance on-site. 21:15: FirstDegree links Beatty to Tank to seal off Western movement. All avenues of escape are now blocked from distant portals. 21:30:Deaglan421 arrives on site. 21:57: Battle continues with Resistance preventing Enlightened from moving the Shard. 22:30: FreakSociety departs from the site. Resistance have been tracking Enlightened activity due south of Boulder City in the Bullhead City, AZ area. They establish a link from Bullhead City to Essex allowing access to the IE in California. 22:50: The Resistance in a bold move attack early and successfully capture the portal even though they are out-numbered on site. 22:57: The Resistance successfully hold the Shard portal through the 23:00 battle, but continue to be unable to create links. 23:15: Kimmie and JennyWeb leave and establish nearby blocking links to prevent movement before returning to the Shard portal defense. 23:50: The Enlightened greatly outnumbering the Resistance successfully take control of the portal. The Resistance capture a nearby portal and create numerous blocking links, preventing any movement even without having to take down links from the Shard portal during the 00:00 battle. A local Enlightened offer the four Resistance agents on site $50 each to leave. Offer is made multiple times and is always rejected. Wednesday, November 20, 2013 00:20: The Enlightened numbers are starting to dwindle and the remaining members are running low on gear and seem to be disheartened. 00:57: The two remaining Enlightened visit rather than actively fighting during the 01:00 battle timing. It becomes clear that if the Resistance can clear the blocking links they’ve established they may have an opportunity to move the Shard tonight. 01:57: Resistance maintains ownership of the portal and continue to hold successfully. Linking remains problematic. 02:10 Kimmie and JennyWeb need to leave, but establish additional blocking links to the South and East. Delier and Deaglan421 remain to continue the battle through the remainder of the night. 03:00: No change in the battle pattern. 04:00: No change in the battle pattern. 05:00: No change in the battle pattern. 06:00: No change in the battle pattern. 07:00: No change in the battle pattern. 08:00: No change in the battle pattern. 08:34: BigDevious is returning to Las Vegas from Southern California. Takes down the green Essex to Bullhead link and creates a blue blocking link from Essex to Baker. Delier slips away and utilizes Jarvis virii to take down three blue blocking links before returning at the top of the hour. 08:55: Submarginals arrives at Boulder City for the 09:00 defense and link attempt. 08:58: Delier is able to successfully link to Nipton; however, the one Enlightened agent is able to successfully bring down the link prior to jump. Vegasmaize is at Indian Springs and creates a link from there to Nipton. 09:40: The Resistance decide to try linking earlier to allow for more attempts. Submarginals fails in his attempt to make the link to Nipton; however, Delier is successful seconds later. There is only one Enlightened agent on-site to oppose and he is not a Level 8 agent and is running short on supplies. 09:59: Vegasmaize arrives at Boulder City, upgrades the portal and assists in the defense. The team is able to hold the link. 10:00: The Shard successfully moves to Nipton. The Battle of the Shard in Boulder City, NV is over 28 hours after the Shard arrived, much of that time with intense battles at the top of every hour. Vegasmaize brought donuts for everyone to the successful jump. The Enlightened agent reluctantly eats one. 10:06: Submarginals is dispatched to Nipton to defend the Shard should any Enlightened go after it. Vegasmaize is dispatched to Indian Springs, NV. 11:00: Shard successfully leaves Nipton for Indian Springs, NV. 11:02: Submarginals arrives at Nipton and is able to Jarvis the link. He 'remains on site at Nipton until 13:00 in case Nipton is needed again. 11:10: Vegasmaize arrives at Indian Springs, NV. He is alone without opposition. Keys are being located and moved to allow sending the Shard through Mexico; however, they won’t be available for a number of hours. 11:50: Vegasmaize successfully establishes a link to the Mercury PO portal. Following the link creation, he receives a random comment on COMM, “What are you doing?” He replies, “Drinking milk.” 12:00: Shard successfully leaves Indian Springs for Mercury. 12:30: Plans are established to bounce the Shard out of Mercury in a few hours to a portal in the desert before allowing it to return while the necessary keys are transferred. 14:00: Controversy erupts over the Shard being in a restricted area. 18:00: Linking is broken again and is not allowing Vegasmaize who has access to the Shard portal to create links either in or out. Keys are still enroute, but won’t be present in time. 20:00: Word is passed that the Shard needs to be relocated or Nia-Ops will do it. Linking remains broken disallowing the ability for the Shard to be moved. Additional agents attempt to link in; however, are unable to successfully complete a link. 21:00: New plans are created to migrate the Shard in shorter hops to the South. Valley Resistance Militia in Arizona agree to accept the Shard if Las Vegas Resistance can move it to Lake Havasu City, AZ. 23:00: The Shard is moved by Nia-Ops back to Nipton, CA. New location is identified by Las Vegas Resistance. 23:07: BigDevious having just arrived back in Las Vegas from business travel volunteers to travel to Nipton to further the Shard to Lake Havasu City. ToadSmasher volunteers to go with. Thursday, November 21, 2013 00:30: BigDevious and ToadSmasher arrive at Nipton. They are alone without opposition. BigDevious is unable to successfully link with the on-going Link Established, but then it fades; however, ToadSmasher is able to successfully link to Lake Havasu on this occasion. 01:00: The Shard successfully jumps to Lake Havasu City, AZ and into the capable hands of the Valley Resistance Militia. Outcome Las Vegas Resistance along with St. George Resistance successfully intercepted Shard #1 taking it from the Enlightened hands and routed it significantly further away from San Francisco. In the process, the Las Vegas Resistance demonstrated our local dominance and showed the world and the Enlightened that we will not allow any Shards to traverse our territory to get closer to San Francisco. While it was a very frustrating experience due to problems with linking, the Las Vegas Resistance will not give up. All involved in the battle are HEROES in our on-going struggle against alien influence. We will always RESIST!!! All told, we had the Shard in our area under active control for 52 hours. With this newly obtained experience, we are ready to again dominate the Shard should another one come into our range. Jarvis will not be resurrected on our watch. Photos

title: Resistance Shard Operations
text: Resistance Shard Operations Resisting the Resurrection of Jarvis The 13Magnus Anomaly unleashed 13 Jarvis Shards around the world. For 6 weeks, the Resistance fought to move the Jarvis Shards to their goal portal in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Oliver Lynton-Wolfe claimed that he could destroy Jarvis permanently once a viable amount of Shards were gathered at the Piramid de Mayo. The following operations document the coordination and hard work of Resistance agents to deliver the Jarvis Shards to Piramide de Mayo and to block the Enlightened from their goal at Cupid Span. First Wave Second Wave Operation: Flush the Shard November 11, 2013 Agents in Las Vegas fight to prevent Shard 1 from reaching Cupid's Span.

title: agent_initiatives/sitreps/resistance/13magnus/unight8
text: Unight8 Global report https://plus.google.com/+carolineBoraChoain/posts/HFNVVJbpYR6 Overview Mission goals Overall Involve as many Resistance agents as possible In as many countries as possible Phase I: Worldwide Nightstalker Build as many L8 portals in as many cities as possible, during local night- time Phase II: Connect the cities to each other, via a world spanning link Phase III: Create fields to dominate global MU count Results : Mission successful !! About 3.200 resistance agents 55 countries 140 cities Link chain established across the entire globe to connect Europe, North America and Asia 1.267 million MUs (75 %) The plot Let me tell you a story Once upon the time, in Constance, a city between Germany and Switzerland. An Ingress team, chatting in a dark and secret hangout… ( Just kidding, the screen gave light ^^) During this Hangout, some crazy ideas were shared. One of them was to unify the world under the banner of the resistance !! ( https://plus.google.com/101867202320986624254/posts/SjAaZB2gaac ) … There was a man crazy enough to think that the project could be possible. +Jens Spaniel took the decision to realize this dream. The idea was to create a mainlink around the globe, and after that, to build branch links to link every city in the world. As a good manager, +Jens Spaniel first prepared the organisation’s structure. Management tools were set up. One team was dedicated to the Mainlink’s organisation. He then started looking for help. First things first: he had to find people willing to represent a country, or even a continent! The first weeks of the project were dedicated to this task. In mid-August, a message caught my attention: someone was looking for a coordinator for Belgium. That’s how I met Jens. He proceeded to explain his project, and, of course, like everyone else, I told him he was crazy. Fortunately, since I’m just as mad as he is (yeah, just ask my team...), I decided to take on the challenge on August 20th. Things started to get heavy very fast. We had to continue recruiting. I helped +Jens Spaniel as much as I could. We had hangouts with every candidate, to measure their commitment to the project and their capabilities. Several tools were developed to give us a global idea of the advancement of each separate project. Instructions were transmitted. We created Google+ communities, both global and national. +Vincent Rammelt was put in charge of setting up the Mainlink, helped at first by +Matthias ℬ. and +Sergey Fayngold Vincent had planned a four week holiday in September. Most of this time he had no Internet connection. This was a special challenge for the main link team. (you’ll find his #sitrep here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1864V6MjCX80bBMUoxPyo3El4RdqsqgLio0AB0_qmyLg/edit# ) +Jens Spaniel then offered to share the global organisation of the project with me, which I accepted, more motivated than ever. That’s when I realized what a huge workload this project represented: We had as many as 20 simultaneous hangouts with different people. We had to deal with different cultures, different languages, different mindsets... Long “video hangouts” were organised, to try and find the best solutions with every team. We also had to deal with time zones. Asia in the morning, Europe during the day, and North and South America at night. Even if we were already experienced in project management, we learned a LOT thanks to this experience. (especially me) Some were already motivated and believed in our ideas. For others, we had to persuade them of the project’s feasibility. This took a lot of time and energy. By mid-september, the teams were mostly complete. But Jens and I were exhausted. We began to have our doubts. Maybe it was time to give the lead to someone with a less “european” idea of management. We then decided to let +Tzafrir Rehan lead. Jens and I stayed as consultants on the project. +Tzafrir Rehan , fresh and full of enthusiasm, brought the project to completion. The last countries filled their organization spreadsheets, the mainlink team gave their final plan. The chosen route was as follows, with all the risks and key transfers that it entailed Alaska (US) -> Canada -> US West Coast -> US East Coast -> Canada -> Greenland -> Island -> Norway or UK -> Germany -> Latvia -> West Russia -> East Russia (Anadyr’) -> Alaska. A whole key exchange network was set up. Each travelling agent was told to communicate his schedule to optimize transfers. A 1966 km long link was scheduled. Stress peaked. The team could fortunately rely on agents such as +Anton Khudozhnik (@Toxyd), who began an epic journey! (see his sitrep here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1I4JYFqvl4sVUV0KVztCvepiHXFwYlmlOFyKKfml374M/edit ) The continent coordinators then started work on the “branch links). Cleaners could also start their huge task. +Tzafrir Rehan succeeded in finalizing the project. November 15th. We experienced cold sweats when we saw a new operation from ENL in Asia. Our teams worked to limit their action and clean the field. Each troop movement of Kermits was analysed, followed… Hangouts are burning. The stress was crazy! Each country sent their final plan, working around unexpected field situations. Saturday 16th arrived. I was of course on the battlefield to clean, fully equipped with phone, tablet, and laptop within easy reach. Each country sent its final instructions. 11h50… My heart goes BOOOOMMM 11h50… Hangouts are going crazy ?? 11h58 : Chatting with frogs on the field to distract them... 12h00… My legs can’t hold me anymore 12h01… First links are established 12h10… My team links Germany to UK My eyes are burning, I’m actually crying; I check the map… everything turns blue; counters are crasy, 50%, 60, 70... 75%!!! I get back to my team and everyone is screaming. Nobody can believe what is happening ... We did it! We united 55 countries We created over 22 000 level 8 portals. We made a link that spanned the entire earth!!! Prolog We - as the global team - are absolutely stunned how Unight8 excited agents all over the world. There are hundreds of SitReps available which you can find searching for #U8Completed . You, our fellow agents, have done some unbelievable! If it was as field agent and street fighter, as cleaner, as linker, as agents which gathers and transported keys or as coordinators. And we are happy to see how thrilling this operation was for everyone from us. How much fun you had. And how Unight8 unites us. Here you will find exciting photos: https://plus.google.com/u/0/events/cciim2jcr0fg6ur9hab37kqih6o Thanks to 3.200 participated Resistance agents Global Team : +Tzafrir Rehan @Tzafrir, +Jens Spaniel @BTA, and me@Boranova US : +Ruth Shepherd @Rio5 Canada : +Steve B @Koz9 Asia : +Kelvin kw Lee @Kelis, +puppy Chen @Puppychen, +Shang Yen See @Odysseus, +Riddhi Dhannawat @Illidan Oceania : +Nihal Mirpuri @Nylonee Africa : +Tzafrir Rehan @Tzafrir, +Sean Scott @FrostyZA South America: +bryan meyer @bcmeyer Europe : +Jens Spaniel @BTA, +Vicki Ellen @Mimtwin, +Carlo Carparelli @Feanim, +Gilles WEBER @Arael Link team : +Vincent Rammelt @sirVinc, +Matthias ℬ. @ThiasX, +Sergey Fayngold @NBZ4live, +Irina Sokolova @Kshul, +Anton Khudozhnik @Toxyd And thank you, thank you so very much to EACH AND EVERY agent that participated in this operation. From country coordinators to linkers, from cleaners to operators… You were amazing! You gave us back hope! Trust your team*… This has never been so true. THANK YOU. Unight8 US UNight8 US #Unight8 US Sitrep for November 16th, 2013 To know where to start writing a sitrep for #Unight8US is difficult... it was such an intense operation that was planned months in advance. I've been on this operation since August, and the last three months of my life were absorbed by Unight. Along the way, I've had some incredible experiences with extraordinary people, and that's how I'd like to explain UnightUS to you all. It began when I was contacted by Jens Spaniel and Caroline Bora-Choain about an international operation, and would I be interested in taking over the US Coordination for it? I passed off a few other obligations and said yes. I fell in love what they described to me, and over the next week my excitement for it became infectious as I described the operation to leaders from all over the US and began recruiting. Yes, we would participate in the first around-the-world link. Yes, we would swamp our cities with PL8s. But we would and could do more. I approached +aniel Lawrence about my idea to field the entire USA as an additional side-project for Unight, and found out he had been quietly reaching out to others with the same idea. By combining projects already in the works, we had the field plan we needed: Project Blue Light, Bermuda Triangle, Great Blue West, and Olas de la Resistencia were all absorbed. Our plan began coming together. I recruited Daniel and +Timothy Johnston as my East and West field coordinators, with Miguel G handling most of the Project Blue Light side. Without these agents, our operation would have failed... they stuck close by and worked hard. Our state leaders were next. Without you, well--you will never know the depths of my gratitude for what you did in pulling your people together with limited knowledge of the full scope of this operation. Credit where credit is due: +Daniel Lawrence , +Timothy Johnston , +Miguel G , +Steve Ball , +Scheurmann R. , +Steve Martin , +Vain Vurxof , +James McFarlin , +chris rivera , +Mike McCabe , +Corey Peoples , +Chad Walter , +Adrian Michael Nida , +Zeke Cao , +Andy Lohaus , +Nathan Haug , +Bruce Kraemer , +John Spartan , +Aaron Ruff , +Thomas Peters , +Richard Wire , +Nathan Lindeman , +Lance LeBlanc , +Volta X , +Michael Finley , +William Olsen , Phil Painter, +Mike Kelley , +Raymond Cool , James Lynch, +Paul Pawlowski , +Mark Guerra , +Clint Babb , +Pedro Owsik , +Erik Tate , +Peter Salvatore , +Steve Schwaller , +Thomas Sanford , +Joshua Wehmeyer , +Jackie Grove , +Juan Gonzalez , +lead foot , +Nick Nelson , +Justin Melville , Ricardo Antonio Cabral Mejía (Dominican Republic) Charles Barnard (Bermuda) Adam Gilmore & Zak, Canadian agents who threw the link to Greenland and CT. Canadian Coordinator for Operation SHIELD +Steve B : Canada had been planning their own coast-to-coast fielding project that we caught wind of while working closely with Canada for our around-the-world lnk. Catching our excitement, I explained to them our project and would they be interested in combining them to fill out North America? The answer was a resounding YES, and we had Canada on board. Thank you so much, Steve, and all Canadian agents that participated in this amazing operation. #Unight could not have completed the main link without you, and for that I am so grateful. You guys made some of the most impressive drives and sacrifices for this operation, and I'm looking forward to reposting your sitrep here with all agents involved. ﻿ Special kudos to Lisa Chems Mum for rallying some last minute details in the west and +Breanna Dreyer for your hard work on intel. Tim, you were crazy to have done that all from your phone and I applaud you for your commitment to this project even when you had all the reason in the world to quit over real life circumstances. To our entire intel team, you were all amazing. Thank you for staying up all night and all your hard work. Keys: Please take a minute to read the story of our international key exchanges, because it was truly an epic undertaking. At the end of it, we had moved keys hundreds of thousands of kilometers and circled the globe twice. Anadyr, Russia to Anchorage, FL... thank you, +Amanda Saunders . You did more for Unight and myself personally as a friend than anyone else. The key exchanges were incredible. Some of the most notable key paths are mapped out here: https://mapsengine.google.com/map/edit?mid=zijBFFgKJpEk.kDckmGpQ0gLU While detailed stories/proof of exchanges can be found here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1I4JYFqvl4sVUV0KVztCvepiHXFwYlmlOFyKKfml374M/edit https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pPrwztnbDxUmwxDMn3a1pGr2Ns9nWNy6HgSfZCGHrgk/edit Go-Time: The weeks leading up to this event grew tense. We began losing people to personal responsibilities and scrambled to find replacements. We heard from our global leadership that our link time for the US was 6:00 am EST, and asked our crew to bear down and redouble their commitment to UnightUS. We had to change portals several times, as our portals were chosen for their inaccessability and suddenly the link time made it impossible to access the parks we had chosen. Last minute key exchanges happened the night before the event. Agents tired from last minute planning buckled down for the long, 24-hr haul until our event. Agents scattered to their stations and clearing started the night before. Lots of red bull was consumed. About 10pm, we realized there was a green blocking link running along the border of NM and Mexico. AZ, NM and Mexico agents scrambled to assemble before the message came down from NM lead +Mike Kelley -- There is no reception in that town. One agent had booster equipment, but it was 3 hrs away. Agents questioned the long drive if they were to arrive with no signal, but some were willing to try, just waiting for the order. Six hours of scrambling and brainstorming went into this when suddenly, a seemingly random L3 blue player took down the link. Cheers erupted. We could now complete the field from Los Angelos to Cabo to UT. A few minutes later, however, Mike brought something odd to my attention. Zoomed in on the offensive portal, you could see "*** has captured their first portal", which was suspicious for a player with 30k AP. The player was also unresponsive on comms, leading to the sinking feeling that someone had spoofed the blocker down. Knowing we couldn't let this operation be tainted, I announced to the awaiting teams that our field to Cabo was scrapped. Millions of MUs lost and one of our most solid fields in the West, gone. We pushed on. Sudden blockers out of seemingly nowhere lead countless agents on long drives. There were several near-misses with vehicles hitting deer in the middle of the night, (including +David Manvell who put himself in the ditch avoiding hitting one) and one Florida agent +Kevin Bruner took down a link blocking the FL coast by driving to a remote area with a bear standing guard at the portal. We watched breathlessly as two L8 ENL agents in Victoria, TX took out blue fields in preparation for the TX anomalies the next day. They came less than a mile from our prepped portal and passed on by without touching it. Ghost links in Tallahassee, FL nearly gave us all a heart attack, but a solid report and a quick response from Niantic allowed us to keep pushing towards our goal. Utah and Connecticut have the most amazing stories of all, with agents hiking in the dead of night to take down blockers at Delicate Arch in Moab and CT agents climbing the jetties to build their portal at Saybrook Lighthouse. Everyone came home weary and safe. Last-minute blockers appeared in Long Island minutes before the links were to go up, and agents scrambled to the scene. Dominican Republic agents ran a few minutes behind and we all held our breath as the last blocks came tumbling down and our agents stood ready with their fingers thumbs on the 'link' button... we waited til 6:01 am EST...waiting for global's command... where is global's command? 6:03... no command. Links began popping all over the world, and we were clear in the US -- GO GO GO! -- came the link command. "Did she say go?" said adrenaline-pumped voices trembling.... and the links popped. Fields popped. Two hours later of fighting blocks later, our goal had been achieved, and no more fields could be made. Jacksonville, FL hub was jarvised and we called it a day. 1.26 billion mind units all over the world, and the US had contributed by making some of the biggest fields in Ingress history. Special achievement awards to: Amanda Saunders for flying for keys, +Eric Johnson (flyboy1 and copilot Scarlett kahlo007), the pilot who made a next-day flight from Miami to Gainesville to deliver Merida keys in time for the shard departure and Unight, +Tzafrir Rehan our global operation leader and the entire global team, CT and NEFL Resistance for doing shard-duty all night last Saturday-Sunday and then this operation overnight yesterday. +Linda Besh for funding one of the agent's flights that facilitated key exchanges. +Adam Gilmore and son Zak, who drove several hours to Gaspe, CA to then sleep in the car overnight to flip the Gaspe portal back and forth to a L8 with the new cooldown rules. You two are rockstars and my own personal heroes. Way to go, Zak :) Nice job throwing the first ever link to Greenland!! Agent +Anton Khudozhnik who flew to Anadyr...there are no words for what you did for us. Please, everyone, read the Russia key transfer story. There were so many amazing feats and transfers and personal sacrifices that I can't even begin to mention, so I ask that you list any that I have missed in the comments below. Let's honor our fellow Resistance heroes. title: agent_initiatives/sitreps/resistance/byctid
text: G+ Sitrep It started with a seemingly innocent thought, little did I know it possible that this thought would lead me on a 15 hour journey filled with snowstorms, shocked resistance members, amazing cheeseburgers, blocking links, extreme use of Jarvis viruses, green dinosaurs, fake bison, and really big penguin in Wyoming. Before I digress into explaining the moments above I feel the need to elaborate on the beginnings of the operation. I had left work early and being low on gear decided to reach out to an area just north of Salt Lake City where there is generally a standing 7 farm. After confirming the farms location with +Dallas Smith (agent bigb0lud0) I began what should have been a 10-15 minute drive to the farm. On the way I heard that, +Rob Christensen (agent DooshRaab) was working out near an anchor point, and able to link into delicate arch if one blocking link was taken down, taking advantage of allowing us to take advantage of an existing link between rock springs and the arch. Joy! Locally we had been jumping at the bit to do a field (as a few of us are known to say, "I get AP 1500 and 700,000 MU at a time" credit +Michael Anderson agent mohughes5150) and with this knowledge we jumped in action, some by immediately checking blocking links and others, like myself putting anything else we might do in the next few hours aside to go take them out. So I found myself changing plans from the original quick trip to snag gear to a 2 hour drive into Willard bay to Jarvis a back road portal on the shores of The Great Salt Lake (sorry about that +Chad Painter agent chromeangel i really hope you weren't going for guardian on that) then two more in the town of willard itself (again sorry Chad. 1000 pardons) then on to a post office 1 hour east of in the mountain town of Huntsville to take out an Enlightened link. After that I decided to hit up the Shooting Star Saloon in Huntsville for one of their delicious burgers. Meanwhile, +John Tilton (agent sworcery) volunteered to go down to Saratoga Springs and take out the blocking links there. So burger consumed and feeling like a job well done in northern Utah, I began to head back home and get in touch with agents in wyoming to ask if they could clear a few links on their end. Getting in contact with the few agents in Evanston, Wyoming was easy enough but none of them would be able to get to the blocking links in time for DooshRaab to make the northern link. Silence from the one agent we knew in Rock Springs. Needless to say we were worrying this field would never happen, and being the only agent in contact with Rock Springs meant that soon, someone asked the question I had been trying to think about. "So Phill, any word from Rock Springs?" I scrambled for an answer but all that I could type was "No. If we don't hear from them soon I'm half tempted to go up there myself." Immediately (much to their credit) +John Tilton and +Grant Barney (agent Gmonee) both volunteered. SInce Grant lived closer to my location on I-15 and also owns a car that could make it to Rock Springs and back on $50 I headed to his place to trade cars and head out after a quick key exchange while DooshRaab fired his to the arch. Skipping ahead (2 hours and much hangout, and Zello chatter) Grant and I arrived at Little America, where Jarvised (if you are keeping count those are #4 and #5 respectively) Dino and Buffalo portals, snapped a couple photos and were back on the road to Rock Springs. To state we came quietly into Rock Springs would be a gross understatement. Within 5 minutes of our arrival we used yet another Jarvis (#6) at Long Wall Shearer Cutter Drum then another (#7) at White Mountain Library and one more (#8) at Rock Springs recreation Area. Finally we were ready to drive to Palisadea Park and lay down our field. On the way to the Field the Salt Lake Enlightened Agents +Nick Brooks (evilpeno) and +Martin Bradford (meanchevs) began to mobilize, blocking links began to pop up going into southern Idaho the call once again went out and once again Sworcery answered the call, driving in to ada the portal while +Guillermo Pitbladdo (agent Arg3nt0) could fire a fence line west across the lake while +Steve Ball (agent sct23) took out two links on the east. As the first blockers dropped the tension in Rock Springs rose, at this point there was nothing we could do but sit and wait for sct23 to arrive at the next portal, tension rose as he arrived and used an ADA. I furiously began attempting to link as soon as we got the go ahead and finally after a few attempts the link was established and we could relax as we drove to flip two more portals in town (Jarvis #9 and 10) before heading to Veterans Memorial Park to throw two more layers over the work we had established (which of course required use of Jarvis #11). All in all it was a fantastic evening which gained me some new records (over 2.5 million MU combined from all three fields) and a notch in my belt as far as I'm concerned. Sadly the field only lasted a few hours before it was taken down by [information chosen not to be shared] (agent cheeseturd) from the northern colorado area. Agents Involved Field Teams +Phill Faber (ReverendLegend) +Grant Barney (Gmonee) +Rob Christensen (DooshRaab) Link Destroyers +Guillermo Pitbladdo (Arg3nt0) +Steve Ball (sct23) +John Tilton (sworcery) The People Who Owned the Portals We Jarvised (sorry) +Chad Painter (chromeangel) +Kelly Richards (Amser) +Daniel Fields (Docstermania) +Island Richards (Allocution)﻿

title: Operation Event Horizon
text: Operation Event Horizon Original Link +-+-+- INCOMING TRANSMISSION -+-+-+- Decrypting > > > > > Decryption complete Message Begins... Operation EVENT HORIZON - Interim SitRep An event horizon is the point of no return, where nothing, not even light, can escape. In the early hours of Sunday 26 January, Ingress Resistance agents in UK, Ireland, Belgium, Faroe Islands and France initiated Operation EVENT HORIZON. This was an operation to gain the maximum amount of MU for the Resistance and make sure that anyone underneath the fields was under no illusions who was in control. We aimed to create 7 megafields over Ireland and 19 megafields over the UK. Apart from one link failing (and it's associated field) due to the portal being 1km short of range, we completed our sequence of 51 links. France weren't able to complete their sequence, but got a large part of their fields completed. MU Totals Ireland = 13,657,615 MU France = 113,214,478 MU UK = 517,903,908 MU Total MU count for UK, Ireland and France was: 644,776,001 MU ! The worldwide Resistance score at the completion of the fields was 1,293,076,998 MU and the Enlightened score was 554,508,100 MU. Operation EVENT HORIZON accounted for 49.86% of the Resistance score around the world, and 34.9% of ALL MU worldwide! Put one way, this single operation DOUBLED the Resistance score through concentrated layers of fields. Put another way, it accounted more over one third of ALL MU claimed around the world at that time! The plan was in development since the beginning of December, and actively progressed in the last 6 weeks. It involved international travel, collaboration and contacts built up for Unight8 back in Nov 2013. There were many agents in diverse roles such as planning, key farming, key transits, Intel operations, link channel clearance and deploying. The following agents were key to the success of the operation: Primary Planning and UK Co-ordination:@ZenithUK Primary Ireland Co-ordination:@irishstu Primary Belgium Co-ordination:@NorthernLoop Primary France Co-ordination@ Arael UK Intel Operator lead:@AnandaUK Ireland Deployment Team:@irishstu, @bartender, @NovoC, @hjundaj, @curuslulus, @Eldering, @DrCrippen, @rojer9 Cornwall Deployment Team:@ZenithUK, @LadyU, @Nightwerks, @virtek, @Scarabanza Belgium Deployment Team:@NorthernLoop, @yzz, @DirkTas67, @CForce, @zonnypon, @TheHater Faroes Islands Deployment:@Swatch Many others to be fully credited for their help and sacrifice in the full Operation SitRep Agent ZenithUK, of the UK Resistance, signing off. +++ TRANSMISSION ENDS +++ sitrep, ingressreportepisode44

Hidden Info Hidden Info Looking at the spectrogram for the wind.wav audio file, you see the numbers 75 105 49 86 81 80. Decimal to ASCII gives Ki1VQP . This is a hint to the link goo.gl/Ki1VQP where the image cleaning is found Bottom left corner - UvwA2jNBPLgzZ utBQ5MnJHMm﻿ Join the strings, Reverse it and reverse the letters casing MmhjNm5qbTUzZGlpbnJ2aWVu Base 64 to ASCII - 2hc6njm53diinrvien Rows of 2, read from top 1st column and from bottom the 2nd 2cnm3invenirid5j6h﻿ Top left corner - 9jth3hx5t5chunc﻿ Split: 9jth3/hx5t5/chunc. Move h to end, rearrange: 9jth3/x5t5c/hunch 9jth3hunchc5t5x Top right corner - to2q5hau2uia6vry﻿ Groups of 2 and rearrange the groups possible to spell viator,Rerrange the others to make a passcode format (can be ambiguous). Replace viator with Hank 2uau6hanky5h2q Authorised ID - 97r2manboel9wpuy﻿ Groups of 4. Reverse 2nd and 4th row. Read top to bottom, left to right. 9boy7neuralp2m9w Dots next to the fee Rotate them 180 degrees to get braille, groups of 3, octal 2qdc6codeq9r8x Analysis Additional Information The music had the following description competing forces within us. lie in wait. their moment will come. we will be unable to resist our inner hunger. audio, feb2014, enoch_dalby, tuneingress, music

title: audio/lightman_talk
text: Lightman Talk Parts 1, 2, 3 Original Link Part 1 Original Link Part 2 Original Link Part 3 A three part talk Stein Lightman gave. Posted October 26 - 29, 2013 Part 1 Transcript Note posted on Soundcloud - At some point (I believe recently), Stein Lightman gave a brief talk on his work at Niantic. A recording of this talk has made it's way to me, this is the first portion of that talk. It's offers fascinating insight into the man now responsible for the trunk of our knowledge about Shaper Glyphs and their possible interpretations. x So, how did an obvious hustler and charlatan like myself get invited to something like the Niantic Project? The answer’s simple. I’m not a hustler. I actually know my stuff. I actually believe what I’m saying – at least most of it. I was a PhD student in physics, doing Kabbalah and Christian Alchemy – yeah, there was such a thing – at night. I began to see that they were the same thing. I started noticing that there were energy fields, Anomalies on Earth, all around me. I started finding old symbols and drawings in the classics library room where the ancients were seeing or feeling the same thing as I was. Nowadays, we use extremely sensitive equipment, but they, back in their day, still maintained their ‘instinct’ for very minute things in the electromagnetic sphere. We can’t feel them now, for the same reason we can’t talk to the animals. As we became more human, we gave up skills – and, let’s add to that, there is so much disturbance in the atmosphere that it’s almost impossible to pick anything up. So many radio waves, microwaves, airplanes overhead, emails coming in on cellphones – so much chaos that we can’t hear anything. You can’t even go out in the desert to get away from it anymore like the old prophets did. The truth is that sometimes, when I get into a deep enough state of meditation, I can feel the energy from the Portals, even through all the chaos. It’s rare. But it happens. It wasn’t always rare. People could ‘feel’ energy. They could ‘feel’ wormholes. They attributed the energy to ‘The God.’ Why do you think that shrines, temples, and places of worship are often found in very odd places? It wasn’t until the modern age that we started just putting things in arbitrary places where they fit onto a grid. “Hey, let’s put a statue in this shopping mall because the ‘city fathers’ said we had to in the bid.” That’s the way we treat art now. It wasn’t always that way. It used to be that art would find the Portals... But then something very strange happened. It seems that the Portals started moving to find the art. And when I noticed that phenomenon, I realized that there was an intelligent force behind the Portal. Intelligent force. Try defining that. Try selling that to anybody. Doesn’t work. Everybody will either think you’re crazy or you’re a fake. I decided that being perceived as a fake is better than being perceived as crazy. And, parading around as an obvious fraud has its other advantages. It’s the quantum physics version of hiding in plain sight. It’s social camouflage, because this isn’t an exact science. Sometimes I can ‘feel’ the Portals, and sometimes I can’t. Sometimes I’m wrong. As I said before, with all of the chaos in the electromagnetic spectrum it’s very easy to get false readings. It’s no more accurate than predicting the weather or medical diagnosis. Strange thing about science... Everything went bad when people started perceiving science as truth. Science isn’t ‘truth’, it’s a statement of the best guess we can make at any particular moment as to how something works. Part 2 Transcript Note posted on Soundcloud - Here is the second portion of Stein Lightman's talk about his Theory of Portals, and his own history working with and discovering the Ordered Data Signal that we believe to emanate from a transdimensional intelligence called 'The Shapers.' Part 3 Transcript

title: Susanna Moyer's past - Part I of II
text: Susanna Moyer's past - Part I of II Posted January 26, 2014 [https://soundcloud.com/nianticproject/susanna-moyers-past-part-i|Original Link]] g+ link moyerpast1.mp3 Hidden Info Hidden Info On the Twitter post 6.n.07.-11.+.-4.-13.-11.-3.-2.-13.00.-10.05.-.06.-.-13 Six and n are starting locations. Each other tells how far from the starting location to move, and what direction. 6nuc7jacklands5t5a On the Twitter post 2c/b1/1/a/1d/a/2b/a/1a1/b/a/a1b/2a/4a/c1/2c/d numbers = number of slashes letters to numbers (a=1) and then number of dots \ are spaces. Morse reads as 7ute6ezekielg9v7h In the description f6hacpdtz6a6art5mi Move f to end of string, split into pairs, read every other pair. 6hpd6artifactz6a5m In the tags 2zyx2delilahq2f3t﻿ Replace delilah with turing due to it being a secure speech device co-developed by Alan Turing 2zyx2turingo2f3t In the tags ayv3ine6ramgg7o6 Groups of 4, reverse each group 3vya6enigmar6o7g Transcript Additional Information Moyer's Past Part 2 __Description__ We've often speculated on Susanna Moyer's past. She exerts every effort to keep it concealed. It seems one evening, perhaps after a day shooting the report, she allowed her defenses to slip. Someone from her team convinced her to begin to reveal her past to him, and he captured it on a portable recording device. One thing I've learned is that once something has been captured on tape, disk or in any kind of medium, it becomes almost impossible to undo. This recording reveals, among other things, how Susanna was first recruited to the NIA. audio, jan2014, susanna_moyer, nigel_moyer, oliver_lyntonwolfe, carl, nia

Split into three rows of pairs, and read as braille 2dxk8portalp2v6c In the tags d3g8ytcurtvconsiryv8 4 groups of 5, reverse first and third groups, reverse product string, replace IV with 4 to satisfy passcode format. 8vyr4constructd3g8y In the tags 9wobgtgn42ovc6n Split into rows of 3 and read in the non-obvious way. 2gbw9congon6v4t In the tags a5x9rh5ggv7ohzo Move the h to it's obvious position, reverse suffix 5ggv7hozhor9x5a In the tags 8eilzi0ymnnw0juhhv1bvdne Some whispers are heard at 3 minutes moyerpast_whispers.mp3 Transcript Additional Information Moyer's Past Part 1 __Description__ Here is the second, significantly more revealing portion of the audio-file revealing Susanna Moyer's history. Among other fascinating things, this recording reveals one of the rawest nerves in Susanna's past: Her relationship with her father, Nigel Moyer, and her tragic first encounter with Exotic Matter and its Shaping power. Susanna Moyer is perhaps one of the first children of an XM-aware and XM-enriched generation, blessed with all its potential and cursed with all its threats. audio, jan2014, susanna_moyer, nigel_moyer, oliver_lyntonwolfe, carl, nia

title: Sirens
text: Sirens Posted February 09, 2014 Original Link G+ link Audio File stems - Warps - Original Link / Audio File stems - Synth Cords - Original Link / Audio File stems - Samples - Original Link / Audio File stems - Rain - Original Link / Audio File stems - Lead Synth - Original Link / Audio File stems - Drums and Percursion - Original Link / Audio File stems - Clean - Original Link / Audio File Synopsis Enoch Dalby music Sirens Hidden Info Hidden messages Reversing the Warps stem a bit of speech from Misty is heard Warps Reversed Same Instinct that got me out of Vegas and out of LA one step of something bad, that same instinct got out me of Niantic. I knew who would be watching what and when and I got out ! Inside the sirens main track there are also 2 voices. Anthony Castanza has compiled this file Audio file Victor Kureze So... What was the net effect of the Niantic project? Images formed in the data. Images that pointed to infinity. What is known that could invade the human brain as an idea. Because like an idea that you can't shake , the parasite took hold and like all lifeforms did all it could to ensure it's survival. Decrypting the data was the mistake. It began adding to our data. It was like a parasite making sure that it's host would not die. That was the difference between it and a virus. A smart parasite wants it's host to live and to grow, and enlarge it's kingdom. Who would know that when enriched with dark energy it could transmit itself as mental code and take up residency in our brains ? When we though we were studying it , we were revealing our weak tact problems. And what if not this, is the most vital secret any species could keep. Once you know how a shark hunts, you can dominate the shark. Once you know how bees and polen interact, you can harvest honey and enrich gardens. That, not the opposable thumb, or the ability to create is the reason humans have learn how to dominate the earth. Misty Hannah I remember a numb with the documents called Epiphany night. I clearly saw in a way I can't even articulate right now. You are a little bit like a vent act , being run by Shapers. The big thing that made it unlike a actual ventriloque act is that the dummy in this case wasn't actually a dummy. Figuring out the shapers was a bit like figuring out the ventriloque , by figuring out what the dummy, didn't mean to say. I don't know if that makes any sense. But it kind of does. If it doesn't really jive for you , then you know what I came away thinking. Hex to ASCII gives you the prefix and suffix. Following the logic of the previous one the keyword is nagassa 9tvx5nagassar3p7v In the samples stem - ouJcs09rrvufssByBs0903f Lowercap to upper. Uppercap to number and numbers to uppercap (a=0) - OU9CSjRRVUFSS1Y1SjdF . Base 64 to ASCII 9obj4quarkv5j7e In the lead synth stem - 23054515338445746433557364 Pairs, reverse each pair, hex to ASCII 2ptq3hulongf3u7f Analysis Additional Information The music had the following description //Draw near, bring your ship to rest, and listen to our voices. title: devra_bogdanovich_via_lux_via_noir_activity
text: need to complete the Devra Date section and then start on this page - http://investigate.ingress.com/page/5/ Go back to Aug 22 on PA g+ feed --- Before First Via Lux Event June 1 Devra g+ Post - Recovering her memories June 1, 2016 post from Devra on her g+ account - She mentions she is teaching part-time at a Junior College filling in a semester for a professor (we later learn it is Strathmore Community College). She has been recovering her memories with the help of Felicia Hajra-Lee. As many of you know, I was in Tainan this weekend, and I wanted to share why. My guess is that many of you know more about my life since everything that happened at CERN than I do. In some ways, I don’t want to know what horrible things I did while a simulacrum, in other ways, I should know. There is one particular period that that I have no way of retracing, but I was told that I could find what I wanted to know in the Portals at Tainan. These fragments were created by Felicia Hajra-Lee. She may be my best bet at learning these parts of my own past. Until then, I’m spending most of my time in a shared office that I only have for 6 hours a week at a Junior College where I am filling out Spring semester for a professor who was taken unexpectedly ill. I was lucky to get the job. I resigned my previous tenured position as part of a deal to avoid lawsuits and potential prosecution for the activities over the last three years that I have no memory of. There was a little bit of a settlement, so I didn’t have to work to make ends meet, but I do have to work just to keep my mind working and in shape. I have to return to some sense of normalcy. I have to rebuild. In truth, I remember nothing after my onboarding at the Niantic Facility. I have learned that that's because I was murdered and turned into what is known as a simulacrum. Now, my old simulacrum has ended and a new one has been formed, and that's me... like a backup restored on a computer. Except without any of the actual backed up data. Strange times...﻿ Aegis Nova's last event occurred July 16, 2016 and the first Via Lux events occurred on August 27, 2016. =Oliver Lynton-Wolfe and Susanna Moyer End of Aegis Nova Susanna Moyer interviews Oliver Lynton-Wolfe at the end of the Aegis Nova San Francisco Event - https://youtu.be/-6V9dR-2zdE?t=11m37s - She asked if he was supporting Jahan/ADA and he answered "I am a researcher. My only interest is obtaining knowledge and a deeper understanding of the universe; I try not to dabble in politics." He also said he deeply respected Susanna's father, Nigel Moyer. Via Lux the first Via Lux events occurred on August 27, 2016. The last Via Lux events occurred on September 24, 2016 Devra and James Date Detailed information can be found in the Wiki Detailed Dossier of the event including links to the video feeds and transcripts. In general, Devra was out on a date with another new professor. He may or may not have been NIA. The NIA either had him wired or was bugging the area. Resistance New Wave hacked their feeds and built a feed of their own. The 'Waiter' was wearing a blue tech enhancement near his neck. Chapeau, at some point, interceded and extracted Devra. They left. P.A. Chapeau Discusses Devra Date Extraction August 21, 2016 - from Investigate Ingress post On Saturday, New Wave Agents were able to intercept an NIA surveillance operation surrounding Dr. Devra Bogdanovich. They asked for my help in exfiltrating her from that situation. I obliged. I don’t think I’ve fully understood what the New Wave is up to yet, but I know I trust them more than the NIA, and I’m willing do what I can to help ADA. If you want to learn more about those series of events, you should check in with Operation: Essex, they’re working to assemble the data and unravel any clues that could lead us forward. August 22, 2016 Investigate Ingress post So what the hell happened on Saturday? I owe you an explanation, and I want to start out by telling the Enlightened that I was not complicit in any New Wave Resistance conspiracy to exfiltrate Devra Bogdanovich to Wroclaw. I received a tip from the New Wave Resistance Agent had who approached me the other day to meet a contact at a restaurant near Strathmore Community College. I knew from my research that this was where Devra has been teaching since her ‘resignation’ from her previous tenured position (I don’t think the resignation was her idea). When I got there, it was clear what was going down. Another professor named James Blake (Anthropology) was having dinner with her. I believe it was a date. A little research turned up that Blake, like Devra, had resigned from a prestigious university and found himself at Strathmore (which is notoriously hard to Google as of Saturday, I’m wondering if the NIA have tried to bury all information about the place — it could even be that the entire college is an NIA operation, but that’s all speculation). Blake appears to be a regular guy and an authentic scholar. My guess is that he was a patsy for the NIA, who were running a surveillance op for reasons unknown (the surveillance op has been pieced together from the multiple sources by members of Operation: Essex). The conversation traveled into dangerous areas and my New Wave contact told me things might be getting out of hand, so I extracted Devra. That’s pretty much all there is to tell. Secret New Wave Plan August 24, 2016 Investigate Ingress Post New Wave Resistance left this comment on my G+ page: The New Wave Resistance shares the video Chapeau, or should we say, Richard Loeb didn’t want you to see. In truth, we hope that he and Devra succeed, but we are the enemy of secrecy. It is no secret that the NWR plans a massive ambush. It doesn’t need to be a secret. The Enlightened do not have time to respond. If all goes to plan, if every member of the NWR does their job, our victory is assured. ADA’s reawakening is assured. These two videos were included in their post(see below) As I said, there were things I wasn’t telling you. There are still things I can’t tell you. I figured we were under surveillance and this would leak. Don’t we all know that we’re always being watched? But you can buy time. I wanted to give Devra a chance to get to Wroclaw. I’m hoping she does remember the password for the Vault. Right now, we need information and information is in the vault and Devra had the key. That much I know. One day all will come to light about the ‘Lost Days’ in Wroclaw, but suffice to say that a deal was struck. As I told you in the beginning, the world is not what it seems. The two videos were posted to this channel - New Wave - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRQNAXDV9pLd_T-2j-S43dQ PAC and Devra exfil - NWR Sourced PAC and Devra - Phone hack Hank Johnson's Shares Concern About Devra September 8, 2016 - Investigate Ingress Post Hank Johnson just wrote up a Google+ post sharing some of his concerns and theories about Dr. Devra Bogdanovich — the Vault — her so called ‘lost time,’ and more. Hank’s Post: Devra has remained dark since Wroclaw. We all know from the compromised P. A. Chapeau video that she went there to find a ‘password’ that somehow leads to a ‘Vault’ — whatever that is. Then she went to Wroclaw… Appeared to be in very good spirits, and then nothing. If anybody has any information as to her whereabouts after Wroclaw, let me know. According to PAC (who I messaged about this earlier), she hasn’t been seen back at her college either. Worrying. There was some thought that she was trying to recover or remember something from a ‘lost time.’ My guess is her lost time was the interval after the incident with Farlowe and 855 in the caves and before she went to work with Ilya at Visur. My other guess is that whatever happened in this lost time made her relationship with ADA became deeper. Even the Australian Incident could have been staged to look like they were at odds. Or maybe they were. ADA’s ultimately a big unknown. But take this into account: ADA was possibly aware that Devra was a simulacrum and thus faced a non-mortal threat in Australia. Could the Vault refer to some repository of lost memories extracted as the researchers were made into simulacrums? Or could it have been something Devra contributed to in her last recursion? Something connected to ADA? Something else entirely? I don’t know but it’s interesting to speculate on. The Vault Email Image and Devra's whereabouts September 10, 2016 - Investigate Ingress Post I got this image via an anonymous email account. They said they had read Hank Johnson’s recent post and knew what Devra’s Vault was. Or… well… they had a theory. Either way, I’m not sure how to extract the theory from this bizarre image they included with the email. Maybe you can help September 11, 2016 - Investigate Ingress Post Hank Johnson weighed in on one of the unsolved mysteries from the last few weeks — the source and meaning of the location or object known as Devra’s Vault. We know that she went to Wroclaw looking for it, but she’s been off the radar since. Hank shared some theories and concerns, and seems to have kicked off a chain of events. Last night I received a cryptic image that I believe leads to a Portal where a source claims to have planted information about the Vault. I don’t know if this intel has been recovered yet… the best tip I’ve been able to get so far is that the bizarre clue bears some similarities to imagery once found in an Oliver Lynton-Wolfe poster by Tycho. Devra's Vault Detailed information can be found in the Wiki Clues Detailed Dossier of the event including links to the clues and recovered media and in the Devra's Vault Wiki Detailed Dossier Devra is Not Missing, Dream, Verbal Glyphs September 17, 2016 post from Devra on her g+ account - Devra is not missing, she was processing. I am not missing or in any danger. Just... processing things. Richard Loeb did a number of kind things for me that night when I was having dinner with the man who called himself 'James.' He extracted me from an NIA observation and sent me to Wroclaw on a mission that was only of benefit to me, although I wonder if this was what the NIA were after, and if so why? He claims the New Wave Resistance told him about this, but how did they know? And why would they want ME to know? After having spent some time with him, I'm wondering if I'm starting to think like him... I have questions that remain unanswered for now, but one thing did become clear. When I arrived in Poland it all came back. I had heard them. They were the N’zeer. They spoke in verbal Glyphs which I could unaccountably understand. I know that I had dreamed this before, as a teenager, but now I'm beginning to see that it may not have been a dream after all.﻿ Via Noir The last Via Lux events occurred on September 24, 2016 The Via Noir event occurred on November 12, 2016 After Via Noir The Via Noir event occurred on November 12, 2016 There was only one Via Noir event, but there is a potential event happening December 10. 2016 After Via Noir - Troubled November 14, 2016 post from Devra on her g+ account - Devra discusses the final OLW message he left her. That last message from Lynton-Wolfe. It left me troubled. 'Where there was one, there will be many?' 'The Machine cannot be unmade?' I barely slept, his words kept echoing in my mind. I know that we may not have won the war yet, but I know we fought a good battle. I did what I could to help, but I was just taking advantage of what you, Agents all around the world, made possible. The ferocity and energy with which you engaged yesterday, it was what we needed to stop him. I congratulate the Enlightened, and I have already been hearing about how the Acolyte plans to use this advantage to further their cause. In my mind, however, it is the Agents of both Factions who have emerged victorious against Lynton-Wolfe's plans. The true conflict in Noir is not green vs. blue -- it is dark vs. light. I must also extend my thanks to P A Chapeau. Thank you for traveling to Seoul and helping to provide me with the time and resources I needed to undertake my mission yesterday.﻿ Update - Acolyte Rumors November 18, 2016 post from Devra on her g+ account I've been hearing rumors that the Acolyte was able to locate the chamber where Dr. Lynton-Wolfe had been working, and that her operatives have begun exploring the now ruined laboratory for clues and information. I knew this was likely after how the #ViaNoir Anomalies came to an end... From what I've heard, her people found a great deal of destroyed technology from a number of different eras, along with extremely high XM levels. The presence of rare metals indicated that Chaotic Matter (Dark XM) may have also been present. There was no sign of Dr. Oliver Lynton-Wolfe, Klue or Susanna Moyer, though for the latter two that would be expected... I think they were lost even before Lynton-Wolfe fully brought the machine online. I do not know what state the machine's remains were in. I also do not know whether the Acolyte was able to recover any of Lynton-Wolfe's plans and documentation related to the creation of the machine. I don't even know if that matters -- it might slow them down, but I doubt it will stop them... I will keep you abreast of future developments. ﻿ Bogdanovich's Motives November 25, 2016 Investigate Ingress Post

title: 3 Anomalies
text: 3 Anomalies March 5, 2013 Original Link Synopsis Lynton-Wolfe explains the nature of Misty's disappearing act or as he refers to it, hyper-threading. Hidden Info Hidden Info Transcript Transcript Calvin: phillip's security team has reported that Misty Hannah has been moving in and out of an erratic quantum state while in lockdown. Sent at 11:55 PM on Sunday This chat is off the record Lynton-Wolfe: I suspected as much. It's called hyperthreading. It's an artifact of XM entanglement... Calvin: she is in two points in space-time simultaneously? Lynton-Wolfe: Effectively, yes. We don't yet fully understand how this is possible or the mechanics of it, but basically her XM aura flickered in and out of existence. Calvin: is this like what we've seen before? With Hank? Lynton-Wolfe: Correct. It is a heightened version of what we think we saw with Mr. Johnson and the individual currently known as Klue. Calvin: and this is part of your exotic essence theory? Lynton-Wolfe: Quite perceptive. Our best understanding is that sensitives are drawn to places with high concentrations of XM. With prolonged exposure to those sites, sensitives can experience XM entanglement with them. Once the bond is made, they are effectively linked, forever. Calvin: let me get this straight. If I was drawn to my college, when I went there I formed a bond with it, and whatever happens there now affects me? Lynton-Wolfe: If you were a high level sensitive with sufficient receptivity. But yes, it's a good approximation of the theory. Calvin: Misty's as high level a sensitive as I've ever seen. Lynton-Wolfe: I would concur. Do you remember when she told us the story about growing up in Marfa, Texas? Calvin: yeah... Hanging out along the drag near the UT campus. Listening to Stevie Ray Vaughan and fighting the boredom by playing D&D and role-playing games. Lynton-Wolfe: In all likelihood both Vaughan and role-playing creator Gygax were extreme sensitives, channelling XM induced creativity. Calvin: And you're saying that all this is adding up to an emergent anomaly event, like what we just saw with the solver known as Klue in Scotland or previously with Hank at Cahokia? Lynton-Wolfe: Not one. Three. Calvin: This is going from bad to worse. Lynton-Wolfe: I feel quite the opposite. These subjects will be exposed to massive doses of XM. This is a tremendous opportunity for them. And for us as well. Calvin: it's spiraling out of our control. and that worries me. Tell me what's coming. Lynton-Wolfe has attached an image. Lynton-Wolfe: 1st anomaly center. Austin, Texas. Active on 3/9 and 3/16. Anomaly ends at sunset on both those days. I've highlighted the key portal, but all 15 portals in this image are contributors. Lynton-Wolfe has attached an image. Lynton-Wolfe: 2nd anomaly center. Lake Geneva, Wisconsin. Active on 03/16. Anomaly ends at sunset. Again, I've highlighted the key portal, but all 15 portals in this set of images are contributors. Calvin: how do these relate to misty? Lynton-Wolfe: The anomaly in Austin, Texas is a statue of Stevie Ray Vaughan. The anomaly in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin is the site of the convention known as Gary Con, celebrating the sensitive Gary Gygax. Calvin: so now Misty's in play as well. What's the end game? Lynton-Wolfe: Each of the three anomalies' state at the end-time will contribute to the overall quantum outcome. As usual, the mechanic to influence the outcome is to capture the central highlighted portal in a field, with the outermost field dominating. Failing that, by capturing the majority of 15 contributing portals. Calvin: what is your suggested course of action? Lynton-Wolfe: As you know I find these anomalies to be of tremendous value. I would recommend we use the Niantic Dronenet to supply ground operatives with resources, at the very least at the Austin location. Calvin: very well. I will take your advice up the chain. Analysis Additional Information documentschat, mar2013, ezekiel_calvin, oliver_lyntonwolfe, misty_hannah, jay_phillips

title: Agenda
text: Agenda Posted May 19, 2015 Original Link Synopsis Hidden Info Hidden Info Transcript g+ POst from X Is this true? It seems possible...A member of +Operation Essex claims to have come upon this document during her research about Dr. +Edgar Allan Wright. It seems that very little is known of Dr. Wright's history... if you have any information about his past, please share it. It's my hope that as a community we can reassemble the history of this enigmatic and influential figure. x﻿ Transcript of article Conference Agenda Day Two * August 18 8:00 Continental Breakfast 9:00 Track 3: Dialtone Are we looking for Extraterrestrial Intelligence in the Wrong Place? The Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence has been going on for decades and thus far we have yet to establish, 'Dialtone'; verifiable non-random signals or two-way sustained contact with with non-human intelligence. Unitl now, the efforts of scientists and researchers have focused on electromagnetic signal detection using facilities such as the Arecibo Radio Telescope, but are we looking in the wrong place? Prominent figures in the search for 'Dialtone', Devra Bogdanovitch (Theoretical Life), Dr. Paul School (Cosmic Conversation), Dr. Edgar Wright (Poetry of Unknown Origin) and Dr. Victor Kureze (The Quantum Dialer), share their thoughts on new frontiers in the pursuit of communication from alternate intelligences in the universe. Panel Sponsors: The Reason Foundation Dr. Ezekiel Calvin of the A. Doria Institute .... 3:00 Networking and Refreshment Break 3:15 track 5: Owening the Story Magnetic and Anti-Magnetic Communications Positive or negative. Emotional or rational. Inflammatory or reassuring? What draws people to a conversation? What pushes them away from meaningful dialogue? When are these different strategies useful? Respected media consultant Ken Owens (Topical Magnetism) discusses news, the perception of news, and how communication strategies can be represented as physical forces. How to (information lost as article is torn) people away from (more lost as article is torn) Ow Analysis Additional Information documentnews, May2015

text: Almost Niantic Project G+ September 18, 2013 Hidden Info At the bottom of the file WVSYSSTSWRTYSUTSSUSWSVTYSZWRWQWQSQ can be seen. Doing a conversion QRSTUVWXYZ => 9876543210 and then hex to text gets you 4qwg8augustap899y. There are some pixels with the RGB values 520030 321301 252333 243230 133005 040032. Split into pairs, and add 52 to every pair. Decimal to ASCI to get 4rta5mkultrar984t. There is also hidden the string DQLWWNXMPEQNRXLAKSFL - UNSOLVED. In the thumbanil there is some Braille. Swap row one and two and read to get 8wzh5blackopsv237y

title: Beneath
text: Beneath Posted June 4, 2013 Original Link Synopsis Hidden Info Hidden Info Transcript Translation Using a rot 13 we get CC: u r really saying that reh, creator of Conan, knew about the Shapers? I buy that he was influenced by the Shapers. That’s obvious, Cross Plains is a ginormous Portal, but you think he knew about ordered data? NOMAD: Not in the modern sense. He and HPL knew about a book called the Necronomicon (Book of the Dead). It was written at least in part in mysterious glyphs that drove men mad. CC: Do we have this book? NOMAD: No. very ugly history. 1-Page = Madness? Lovecraft said it was written by “The Mad Arab” Abdul Alhazred... NOMAD: Deeper than that. HPL and REH were pen pals. Something Lovecraft said triggered Howard to start looking around his own back yard. Almost literally, in Cross Plains, Texas. CC: That’s my understanding. NOMAD: Theory: Howard found something In the writings of Frank Dobie. Regional author/historian. Dobie talked about a hidden mIne that the Spanish found. CC: san sabo. NOMAD: I think Howard found that mine. Howard wrote some crazy stuff about a lost valley, a civilization buried under the earth. I think he went there, to a real place, where he found something ancient. CC: that's where you’re going. NOMAD: yes Analysis Additional Information documentschat, jun2013, Hank_Johnson, robert_e_howard
