title: Banners (blurb)
text: Banners (blurb) Every day we see them on top of the board. They give us the title of the day. But on occasions there is something hidden in the banner itself. 02/24/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see y37zxroeopct54d Reverse - d45tcpoeorxz73y Skip(2) - d5coox7y4tperz3 Group by 5 and rearrange groups <1, 3, 2> d5coo perz3 x7y4t Move last two chars to the front to make the passcode 4td5cooperz3x7y 06/21/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see x8x4x6x5y3y2yx17y3y0y8z0z2y3x5x8099x4y4yx17x4yx18x8x4x6x5y3x8x4x6x5y3y6 Using the blurb number 111012 and separating into 3 numbers: 11 10 12 Substitute x=11, y=10 and z=12 into string and group into triplets: 118 114 116 115 103 102 101 117 103 100 108 120 122 103 115 118 099 114 104 101 117 114 101 118 118 114 116 115 103 118 114 116 115 103 106 Dec to ASCII: vrtsgfeugdlxzgsvcrheurevvrtsgvrtsgj Atbash: eightuvftwocathexisvfiveeighteightq Words to numbers: 8uvf2cathexisv588q 08/04/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see xfentiu7p4q3isen78. Split into 2 groups xfentiu7p 4q3isen78 Read up the columns to get 4xqf3einsteinu778p 09/01/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 042189079111151151079111045071512109509110112014909218501518 Railfence 2 on the numbers: 054122118099057099111110115112105114097099121118054051057118 Split: 054 122 118 099 057 099 111 110 115 112 105 114 097 099 121 118 054 051 057 118 Decimal to ASCII 6zvc9conspiracyv639v﻿ 09/02/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 521811111115712165011010165111921818813534 Split into 3 rows, read each column top to bottom, and then left to right. Dec to ASCII 4ytb4evolveq895r﻿ 09/03/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see nsieneerthztcoewitgnhetvreoslqadn Railfence Encrypt with 2 rails ninetzceightrolanseerhtowtnevesqd Split at middle and reverse second half ninetzceightrolandqseventwothrees 9tzc8rolandq723s 09/04/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 364g366c234b776h260e224b111a833g909i1026i928h468i56a306f575e Dividing the numbers by letter-number you get 52 122 117 97 52 112 111 119 101 114 116 52 56 51 115 Dec to ASCII - 4zua4powert483s 09/05/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 0FQ3)(81F)481QH04(D Doing ASCII to hex, adding 70 to the values, and doing decimal to ASCII we get 4tyg3bletchleyv482r 09/06/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 0sjcqbqdg25hmpc1r31e8usnpq54ur7evivpvugrt9l6zh8lj3tfs3 09/07/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see C T GRGTFTCQCUCRCRGTCUCQCOGQe ROT 13 every second character = C G GEGGFGCDCHCECEGGCHCDCBGD. Letters to number = 37 75 77 67 34 38 35 35 77 38 34 32 74. Hex to ASCII to get 7uwg4855w842t 09/08/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see wetenrfytcilfnocetcrzte reverse letters and place numbers where needed (each 2 letters represent a number like et = 8) 8xrc3conflicty493w Also in the EXIF - 93 78 07 63 83 73 86 61 07 65 27 70 63 32 83 77 Reverse every odd pair and then do Hex to ASCII - 9xpc8shaperp628w 09/09/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see NXF6097DJ119YXJ10409921080ZX1033OD108119 Isolate the triples of numbers that look like valid decimal for lower case values. Convert those to ASCII NXF6 097 DJ 119 YXJ 104 099 2 108 0ZX 103 3OD 108 119 => NXF6aDJwYXJhc2l0ZXg3ODlw Base64 decode to 5qzh2parasitex789p 09/11/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 2UN6NATVOLV935C Gronsfield with 26935 as key﻿ to get 2sh6exotics935x 09/12/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 8 18 21 1 2 6 7 14 18 19 15 7 6 8 18 Add 1 to each number, numbers to letters to get 9svb3ghostp879s 09/13/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see ixssfwoufmertanislttmrehsienixern Break into triplets then order each triplet third, first, second to obtain 6wsf4mentalismt369r 09/14/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see q1d1e1Dg1C1W1f1E1b1e1601bebc1c 09/15/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see xiswxeuofrnearulzehgittwisoxv split into 3s, flip every alternate group (1, 3, 5...) to get 6wxe4neuralz826v 09/16/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 945-878-882-902-946-892-898-889-887-945-945-944-880 Subtract each group from 999, then do decimal to ASCII to get 6yua5kenp667w 09/17/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 1cTOzQzM1MzM3UmNmZTN3MmN3YzNzUjN3cTN3UzM Reverse, base64 decode, hex to ascii to get 5uwe7gluons549u 09/18/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 062161460515071161341712160151460717066060360613 Rows of four, read first line forwards, second and third lines backwards. Repeat. Decimal to ASCII gives you 2pwc3jacklandp537q 09/20/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 09193226300824012513301343044413281421 09/21/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see AUE4MQEzqJ5wqTyioaZ3ZwE6 09/22/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 0808171708161212081717170809131708171717131114120817170808160916080817170814111208171709161608160817170911090817081717170913120808171717091312080817170812171116081717160809160908171717111314090808171712131311080817170817141408081717121313170817171708121308 Split into groups of 2. 12 and under: 0; above 12: 1. Split into groups of 8, binary to ASCII to get 4sze4matterv677r 08=0, 09=0, 11=1, 12=1, 13=0, 14=0, 16=1, 17=1, binary to ASCII to get 7que3mirrorx949t 09/23/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see NXZaewZrRrbGFsabyvopnlejxozmmtfrvmNlJf 09/24/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see LCA1ZjZjxnEsdGl2ACZ0NDl2 Groups of 4, atbash every odd group, b64 to ascii to get 9vuf6creativep449v 09/25/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 2112143121314112121142121122142212311411221341111412211122141242113121312211323211224212112214112331112 09/26/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see OHVD-ZTdsbC-ZlbGFjZXUyNzNA Replace uppercase letters at the end of each group with the respective number (A=1) OHV4ZTdsb3ZlbGFjZXUyNzN1 Base 64 decode to get 8uxe7lovelaceu273u﻿ 09/27/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 571116121384853715794482561135791119725161167276434549471476775253447179155 3 6 9 = space 1 4 7 = . 2 5 8 = - morse to text 6ryf2inspirer525w This passcode had already been used in 09/28/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see FEIRNDGAFRVRAVVPTBEQFRVRATJBNVAEF 09/29/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see EYYMHUDVWTZZOMVSTNRJGEHDRKAZHHAZZXQTAU 09/30/2013 Original Link Hidden Info On the EXIF you can see 8fi7veaqpls0fi302c60 Rows of 4, read down columns to get 8vpf2felicias367q

title: History
text: History Niantic began handing out Bio cards / Niantic Dossier Cards featuring images and information about Niantic Project participants. The Ingress g+ account has used the tag #NianticDossier on some posts. Post from Brandon Badger about the Bio Cards series. Post from Bill Kilday about the Bio cards. Post from Olga Garcia about the bio cards. It appears that there may be 13 cards released based on this image posted. 2017 Edition Magnus Reawakens First Edition Dossier 01 - Dr. Devra Bogdanovich Joe Philley g+ post Release Date: June 21, 2014 The first card handed out. It was first handed out at the Gettysburg Interitus Anomaly by Devra herself as well as other Niantic employees. Back of Card Information Title: Quantum Biologist, Lead XM Researcher Alignment: Resistance Description: Lead Researcher on the Niantic Project, Devra "escaped" with Roland Jarvis following Epiphany Night. She subsequently joined the Visur Corporation to continue her XM Research (portion redacted) Following ethical disagreements with Visur founder Ilya Pevtsov, she left Visur and is now pursuing a controversial strategy to inoculate the world's population against XM. (portion redacted) Niantic Project Symbol Stamp: NIA Status: Valued Target Dossier 02 - Dr. Oliver Lynton-Wolfe November Lima post 1 November Lima post 2 Release Date: July 16, 2014 Back of Card Information Title: XM Researcher & Engineer Alignment: Enlightened Description: Dr. Lynton-Wolfe was a key member of the Niantic Project team and developed much of the XM technology currently being used today, including Resonators, XMPs & Power Cubes. Following the shuttering of the Niantic Project, he eagerly moved to the private sector to capitalize on his knowledge. During Operation Cassandra his plan to undermine Jarvis and become the new leader of the Enlightened backfired. He sunsequently aligned himself with the Hulong Corporation & used dark XM to attack Jarvis directly. That attack fragmented Jarvis into 13 "Shards" which were reunited to resurrect Jarvis during OPeration 13Magnus. Triangle pointing down Stamp: Declassified Niantic Project Symbol Stamp: NIA Status: UNSTABLE Dossier 03 - Dr. Martin Schubert Release Date: July 22, 2014 Initial Ingress g+ post "Available this week only, Agents can retrieve Dossier 03: +Martin Schubert from Niantic Labs Operatives on Sat July 26 in Dublin, San Diego, and Philadelphia." Back of Card Information Title: Physicist Alignment: unaligned Description: One of the original scientists of the Niantic Project, Martin was originally highly skeptical of the research into XM, but following his first-hand observations of its effects, began to see it in a new light (portion redacted). Recently appeared on Hank Johnson's Nomad, where he explained his theory of 13Magnus and XM powered resurrection. (portion redacted) Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: Surveil Dossier 04 - Carrie Campbell thanks agent C.H. for the images Initial November Lima post Release Date: August 4, 2014 Front of card has a red stamp labeled: Deceased Back of Card Information Title: Semiotics Expert and Linguist Alignment: Resistance Description: Carrie was an extreme "sensitive" to the influence of XM. Inspired by the events of Epiphany Night, she discovered hidden messages being transmitted through XM. (portion redacted). She kept a diary of symbols inspired by XM which came to be referred to as "Shaper Glyphs" and later collaborated with Hank Johnson & Stein Lightman to translate them. During the events of "Operation Cassandra" she used glyphs to thwart a Shaper attack, sacrificing herself in the process. (portion redacted). Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: File Closed Dossier 05 - Enoch Dalby Ingress g+ post Release Date: August 12, 2014 Back of Card Information Title: Musician and XM Sensitive Alignment: Enlightened Description: Referred to the Niantic Project by Carrie Campbell, with whom he had a relationship, Enoch proved to be highly tuned to the influence of XM. Following Epiphany Night, Enoch began creating a series of new compositions inspired by what he had experienced. (redacted portions) His embrace of XM came at the price of his friendship to Carrie Campbell. Following her death, he created music in her honor. (redacted portion) Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: Controlled https://soundcloud.com/enoch-dalby Some media documented by agents in the field https://plus.google.com/u/0/110172426335952627427/posts/RdVXDVxpe6V https://plus.google.com/+AlastairGilfillan/posts/cfZojjZ3qxm = Dossier 06 - Dr. Yuri Alaric Nagassa Ingress g+ post November Lima post Release Date: August 19, 2014 Back of Card Information Title: Astrophysicist Alignment: Unaligned Description: Nagassa was recruited into Niantic based on his discovery of ordered data in what was first believed to be gamma rays, but was later found to be XM radiation. (portion redacted) His theories, as well as a personal friendship with Hank Johnson, led to a collaborative effort to pinpoint XM concentrations, resulting in the discovery of the first confirmed XM portal. His current whereabouts are unknown, though he is believed to be in hiding. Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: Unknown Triangle pointing down Stamp: Freigegeben (Released) = Dossier 07 - Dr. Ezekiel Calvin Ingress g+ post Release Date: September 2, 2014 Back of Card Information Note - Calvin's name is misspelled on the card, it is listed as Eziekiel "Zeke" Calvin Title: Former NIA Operations Director & current Director of IQ Tech Corporation Alignment:Resistance Description: While at the NIA, Zeke Calvin initiated the Niantic Project to study the effects of XM. When it became clear that the project was spinning out of control, Calvin jumped ship to IQ Tech, a private firm with close ties to both the military and to covert agencies. (redacted) Under his direction, IQ Tech has become a major player in the development of XM-based technologies. (portion redacted). Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: Active = Dossier 08 - Dr. Victor Kureze Ingress g+ post November Lima post and release post Ingress Twitter post Release Date: September 9, 2014 Back of Card Information Title: Physicist Alignment: Resistance Description: Kureze was the scientist who originally posited that XM and the Shapers existed in our dimension as well as their own. A dedicated researcher, he was known to go to the extreme in search of answers, (portion redacted). Following the shuttering of the Niantic Project lab, he continued to study XM. (portion redacted) Believed to have been killed while attempting to conduct research on the body of Roland Jarvis. Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: File Closed = Dossier 09 - Hank Johnson Ingress g+ post November Lima post and NL post Ingress Twitter post Release Date: September 15, 2014 Back of Card Information Title: Adventurer, Historian and Documentary Filmmaker Alignment: Enlightened Description: One of the first individuals to identify what would become known as XM, Hank Johnson was a member of the Niantic Project, bringing to it his knowledge of ancient civilizations and the influence of what he termed "power spots." (portion redacted) He has long been a defender of the positive influence of XM. Hank may have been recreated as a synthetic XM construct following a visit to a 13Magnus "nest" in Afghanistan, even before the Niantic Project began. (portion redacted) Niantic Project Stamp: NIA Status: Unknown Ingress Stamp: Freigegeben (Released) Dossier 10 - Misty Hannah Release Date: September 22, 2014 Ingress g+ post November Lima post Back of Card Information Title: = Dossier 11 - Dr. Stein Lightman John Hanke posted a teaser picture Release Date: September 30, 2014 Back of Card Information Title:

title: investigation/images
text: Niantic Symbol Original Link Zurich Found on day 11 after following a QR code in the video The Niantic Investigation 1 - Comiccon. we can see what looks like a body shape ,most likely the statue of Escher in Zurich. Hidden Info The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=chapeau57o. chapeau57o Jarvis Drawing Found in day 13 when click the day number. It seems to show Roland Jarvis and his vision at the age of 6. This image seems to be part of something larger as hinted by the thumbnail for the video Roland Jarvis. There are some dots to the left of the word Jarvis. Solution The dots are actually Braille. Translated it turns into gmvnmvgstromv. Reversing the previous message you get vmortsgvmnvmg Using a letter replacement with this key : G=T M=N N=M O=L R=I S=H T=G V=E We get the word enlightenment already mentioned in Tycho's poster together with a similar image. This is actually a passcode. Trans Original link Found on day 17 after following a QR code in the video The Niantic Investigation 2 - Comiccon. we can see the niantic boat and what looks like the Transamerica Pyramid in San Franscico (plus note the title trans). Hidden Info The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=tycho65g. tycho65g Also portal22q can be seen on the bottom right mirrored. Spomenik Original Link This image is different from the original monument and the one seen in Tycho's poster Hidden Info Looking at the EXIF of this image you find this DGCCXZIHNIHPHH. This code was also found on P.A. Chapeau's Thought For Today 11/26/2012 http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=00cal26 Convert the letters into their position in the alphabet. 4-7-3-3-24-26-9-8-14-9-8-16-8-8. Reverse the numbers and split them into pairs, as hinted to by the Thought for Today 11/26. 88 16 89 14 89 26 24 33 74 Add all pairs of adjacent numbers together and convert to ASCII to produce the passcode higgs29k. Hidden Info 2 The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=epiphany13y. epiphany13y Envelope Found in a link in the Thought of the Day: Day 10 http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=00tod10 by clicking the A in PAC at the bottom It contains the following message k bpou kn myj zvou vnz vxr7koj myj ojzp7oxjz k njjz, vm bk22. 4p7o lp9 kz mp fjm k1qjzk1jnmz p7m pg 14 bv4, npm 9jxp1j pnj. vz 4p7 knzkxvmjz myvm myjoj bvz np gk3jz 97zfjm pn myj vzv xpnzmo7xmkpn, k zp npm 9j2kj5j myj xpnmovxmz k yv5j q7m kn q2vxj zyp72z qpzj v qop92j1 gpo 4p7 po myj nkv. Solution Using the following replacement B=W F=G G=F J=E K=I L=J M=T O=R P=O Q=P R=Q U=K V=A X=C Y=H Z=D or S (depends on the spots) 1=M 2=L 3=X 4=Y 5=V 7=U 9=B Decoded the message says: "I WORK IN THE DARK AND ACQUIRE THE RESOURCES I NEED, AT WILL. YOUR JOB IS TO GET IMPEDIMENTS OUT OF MY WAY, NOT BECOME ONE. AS YOU INDICATED THAT THERE WAS NO FIXED BUDGET ON THE ADA CONSTRUCTION, I DO NOT BELIEVE THE CONTRACTS I HAVE PUT IN PLACE SHOULD POSE A PROBLEM FOR YOU OR THE NIA." NIA Logo Found in a link in the Tuning ADA Chatlog Hidden Info The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=coverup72l. coverup72l Images From the Device (Ben Jackland's G+) The CERN dome Google Glass Link This image was found on the G+ profile of a NianticLabs employee. Note the posters. ADA (Circle) Original Link Metadata The comment field on the original JPEG contains: > SftKj lj ooj ptwh and the author field contains: > Battista Bellaso Bellaso was the inventor of a simple cipher known as the Vigenère cipher. When the string is reversed and run through the Vigenère cipher with the key "ADA", we get a URL: http://goo.gl/jHtfP We can do a look up and see it was only created on the 1st of November (http://goo.gl/#analytics/goo.gl/jHtfP/all_time) This URL links to: http://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/pac/IB/00/sc0/hung/inspired.html Within the same page can also be found: http://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/pac/IB/00/item/contact/Contact.mp3 and: "In modern psychology, inspiration is not frequently studied, but it is generally seen as an entirely internal process. In each view, however, whether empiricist or mystical, inspiration is, by its nature, beyond control." The audio files are mirrored and documented on the audio page. Hidden Info The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=spacetime87s. spacetime87s nxplrd Hidden Info This image was found by looking in the source code of the Thought of the day 18. there you could find on these lines the following letters: 1996: z 2778: 8 2959: h 3860: v 5601: z This as usual is another goo.gl link -> http://goo.gl/zvh8z. It was a hint that some info had been unexplored in day 16 and in the ordered data Enlightenment Original Link Similar to the one found hackig portals Enlightenment from portals Hidden Info On the coat of the scientist you can see a new passcode einstein49r , that is mirrored On the top left there is a series of dots and dashs This is another visual puzzle Put all the lines suck together removing the black/red areas in between The result is below Ingress Original Link This image comes from the A hoax article Hidden Info In the four corners of the image you can see '4r', 'h6', '3z' and '4x' respectively (you might need to play around with the image contrast a bit) and at the top middle part of the image your find the word 'conflicts'. By combining all the hidden letters, you find the passcode 4rh6conflicts3z4x. Zurich Train Station original Link Hidden Info Message in photo: 5pg3zurichx4t4w Zurich Statue Original Link Hidden Info Top left corner has Niantic Project URL. Adding zurichhb (on the statue) to the end leads to a new image, in which two bodies are seen like the ones in Tycho's poster #5 http://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/pac/IB/01/item/01-zurichhb.jpg. 2 will die Original Link Hidden Info The text 5pd6clamantisu4q7u is hidden in the image (passcode) In the EXIF info has this 637154 23745 754613 32 132 7236 213 6237 374516 36471 321 52471 14237 6327 41327 7263 321 4657321 This to be solved requires a 7-segment display character representation Something like this The final result looks like this After we can convert 6d 61 74 74 65 72 34 34 78 to ASCII and we get matter44x (passcode). Hidden Info 2 The link to it from the board gives a passcode http://www.nianticproject.com/?id=zurichhb. zurichhb Who was there? (van) Original Link Hidden Info Messing with the levels you can see the passcode 9wf5coverupy9x5q. Dead Drops Original Link Hidden Info These were the first dead drops (real world locations where you needed to go to obtain items/codes). In this case you would get codes going to Chrome Industries shops in the 4 locations. The Beginning Note: this was posted to the site on 11/14/12 around 10:30 PM EST. Original link Transcription Yesterday I posted two messages from a source that I can not dieclose. This morning, Nianticproject.com suffered from a 3 hour long DDOS attack originating from what I beleive to be multiple governmental networks. My guess is that this was a hasty attempt by the NIA to plug the leaks. A panicked tactic to do anything and everything possible to silence us. BUT WHY NOW? WHAT DID WE UNCOVER? Well, listed up NIA. You managed to knock me down for a few hours, but I'm back. And one thing's for certain. I have not stopped nor will I be stopped. I wil continue to post what I discover every day. And I am not alone. Truth seekers: If the site ever gets knoked down again, reconnect with each other and continue to expose the truth. This fight has multiple fronts. Wiki niantic.schlarp.com IRC irc.irchighway.net #niantic Plus plus.google.com/+nianticproject Twitter #Nianticproject FB Facebook.com/nianticproject THEY WILL NOT SILENCE US. THIS IS NOT OVER. THIS IS THE BEGINNING. P.A.CHAPEAU Bergloff Original Link Images of NIA Field Agent USA/East Art Bergloff outside a Duane Reade. This is related to dead drops Before Scotland Original Link Save Klue (Wallace's Showdown) Original Link Misty Anomalies Original Link Dronenet Deployments Original Link Ingress Homepage Encoded text visible on the ingress homepage under the heading 'Labor Omnia Vincit'. Coded through glyph substitution - fairly simple but difficult to read, rough translation below: 'What follows is the secret hidden message from glass and martyr. We don't have anything profound to report. We hope you have enjoyed decoding this secret hidden message. Well perhaps not hidden' As I say quite a rough decode and it doesn't appear to lead to anything although I haven't heard 'Glass' or 'Martyr' mentioned before. IQTech Company Profile Original Link Anomaly Update Original Link Kryptomira Original Link No Exit (MistyHannah) Original Link Strategic Explorations Original Link Alignment - Ingress Original Link Map Original link Spotted Original Link Magic Castle Original Link Bowstring Original Link Drift (Drift Map) Original Link The #timezero Package Original Link Klue Original Link Corporations Original Link The Glyphs Original Link Vision Journal Pages from Carrie Campbell's Vision Journal, a project she began on Epiphany Night and that has apparently continued to date. more info can be found here #1 (epiphany1) Original Link #2 (epiphany2) Original Link #3 (epiphany3) Original Link #4 (epiphany4) Original Link The Glyphs Emerge (Glyph Hunt) Original Link Carrie Original Link Chicago Original Link Memoriam Original Link Hidden Info In the thumbnail mess with levels. Rotate clockwise for 1 piece and anti clockwise for the other. Translate from braille to get 6vpa2portalx763x The other thumbnail has some pixels on the side. Their Hex values to ASCII gives 9uwg6resonatew922w Lightman Glyphs Original Link It is a reference to this post Hidden Info In the image there is a bit of morse that reads 2rze6shapersv469p Pixels are around mind glyph. Their values are 696855 696853 504856 516750 696854 504856 Decimal to text, hex to base64 to get 7xpc7mindw227v In the thumbnail there is some braille that reads 4pug3u959t. Add "stein" from context to get 4pug3steinu959t Glyphs 2 Original Link It is a reference to this post Hidden Info In the image you can see adADaDBebECFaDcebEBDbFAE cDBeCecfadADBebdbFCEadBD aDCDbfbecEBfADBEcFBdAEBD bFCdBdBEcDBFAdcEaFBDceaE cfBDbDbEbeAEcfAeaeADaDBD cFBEbEaEaeadcfaeadbdbe Doing caps = 1 and lowercases = 0 binary to ASCII gives you 6twh8spookyq527u Also separate the string by even and odd chars in two, find the least repeating one and make it a separator/space, two others would be . and - Morse to text to get 8tve7kirliant492z and 3pyf6marfaw279x There are also some pixels with the values of Pixels: 53 18 80 88 69 00 89 26 62 35 83 25 61 65 55 78 78 96 Sole Repair Concert Original Link Hidden Info Us (glyph translation) Original Link Hidden Info W9PLE7VEOCLAU3E4U9 . Split in groups of 3. Reverse each group: P9W 7EL OEV ALC E3U 9U4. Join together and split into groups of 5: P9W7E LOEV ALCE 3U9U4. Swap x and leave # the same in this pattern: xx#xx ##xx xx## xx#xx 9pwe7lovelaceu394u plaintext flipped that reads 3rzb6codeq824w 8qs3v2b75wmaet﻿. railfence 2, read rows, first row forward, second row backward to get 8svb5metaw723q plaintext in circle - 2pud3clarkev735x 08F347B74458CFB9EA029F0ED628A54C9E04BA 30B55E8D6A23BA0307B721739364334673E5E4 0F6BA76BA5A037A5E7561F66C500237A9168B1﻿ Improve / Lead (glyph translation) Original Link Hidden Info In the bottom left corner of the lead glyph there is a jigsaw. title: investigation/ingress
text: Have fun truth seekers. Basic information is available on the Google Support page for Ingress. Please refer to it first. This page has additional information not covered on those pages. http://support.google.com/ingress Portals = Portals allow for a player to acquire items that are key to playing the game. To hack a portal, it must be within your interaction range (the blue circle around your location pointer), and you must have enough XM. When you hack a portal, you can receive items such as Resonators, Xmp Bursters, Shields, Media, Power Cubes, and Portal Keys. The higher the portal's level, the higher the level of items that can be acquired (although usually you will not receive items any higher than one more that your level). Depending on who controls the portal, what/how much you receive will vary. Hacking portals under control of your side normally provides better/more items. Hacking the other side's portals will get you AP, but you may come under attack from doing so. Portals are key to creating control fields that contribute to your side's overall MU's (Mind Units, or how global control is measured). To establish a control field, you must create links between 3 portals to form a triangle. To create a link between two portals you must have both of them fully loaded with resonators, as well as being within a specific distance of one another. The maximum distance that they can be apart is determined by the level of the "origin" portal, the one that you are linking from. The easiest way to see the distance allowed for a portal is to go into the "upgrade" screen and look at its range value in the top right corner. A portal's level is determined by the average level of all resonators deployed to it, rounded down. You can see the level of the portal when you bring up the detail screen for the portal. The table below shows the range of each portal level. You can also use the Portal calculator Resonators Energy Resonators allow for you to capture a neutral portal as well as improve the range of the portal for creating a link with another portal. Resonators have energy that is depleted through normal decay (10% per day) or when the other side fires an Xmp Burster within range of the Resonator. You can recharge resonators by using your available XM. The below table shows how much energy each Resonator provides. L1: 1000 energy L2: 1500 energy L3: 2000 energy L4: 2500 energy L5: 3000 energy L6: 4000 energy L7: 5000 energy L8: 6000 energy Placement Limits The Official Help topic on the matter indicates that a single person can deploy a limited number of Resonators on a portal at one time. This encourages you to work with your fellow players to help increase the overall level of the portal. Note that you can deploy 4 L2 and 4 L3, as an example, but you won't be able to upgrade the L2 until you reach level 4 and replace the L2's with L4's. L1 - 8 Resonators L2 - 4 Resonators L3 - 4 Resonators L4 - 4 Resonators L5 - 2 Resonators L6 - 2 Resonators L7 - 2 Resonators L8 - 1 Resonator Link Range Xmp L1 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 50m L2 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 75m L3 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 100m L4 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 125m L5 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 150m L6 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 200m L7 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 300m L8 Xmp Burster [Very Common] - Range: 400m MODs= Portal Shield [Common] - 6 mitigation Portal Shield [Rare] - 8 mitigation Portal Shield [Very Rare] - 10 mitigation AP AP gain is itemized below. These can stack: for example, placing a resonator on a neutral portal will give you AP for placing a resonator as well as capturing the portal. This also holds true for placing the 8th resonator, as well as creating/destroying links and control fields. Capture neutral portal: 500 AP Place resonator: 125 AP Place 8th and final resonator: 250 AP Recharge resonators: 10 AP Place shield: 150 AP Create link: 313 AP Create a control field: 1250 AP Hack an enemy portal: 100 AP Destroy an resonator: 75 AP Destroy a link: 187 AP Destroy a control field: 750 AP Player Level = A player's level is determined by their total AP. As you level up, you gain the ability to use the Resonators and XMP Bursters at that level. Here is the breakdown of total AP required per level. Note that AP gain is cumulative (Example: after obtaining the 10k AP for L1, you only need 20k more AP to get to L3) Level 1: 0 AP Level 2: 10k AP Level 3: 30k AP Level 4: 70k AP Level 5: 150k AP Level 6: 300k AP Level 7: 600k AP Level 8: 1200k AP

title: investigation/ingress_anime
text: First Major announcement of Ingress Anime - https://plus.google.com/u/0/+Ingress/posts/6TK3GrnmNfp Ingress Public Mar 8, 2018 Agents, We can now report Fuji TV is the official partner of the upcoming Ingress anime. In addition, we’ve received intel suggesting Agents will have the opportunity to witness exclusive content from the anime and Ingress Prime at the Fukuoka XM Festival after party on Saturday, April 7th. But the fun doesn’t end there; agents who participate in the XM Festival or any of the MAGNUS events will be awarded an in-game exclusive medal. Agents, it’s time to move. Media from Cassandra Prime Event ranslation of Jack's Media - https://docs.google.com/document/d/12ScbdagbufNOuka3hZ1Sj8a4WisulPrEHY_Gj2OqpBQ/edit Translation of Sarah's Media - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1eVdqKS3RVIU38BS1glPwt-cInXr-yHbpIouFC4YyypU/edit Translation of Makoto's Media - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1V3O2vcyOPELatI28T0w62E2lRQNlA0U_OKWk2sWwBJ4/edit Originally shared by Enlightened Today An article regarding the real-time story has been published on the Ingress Anime website. The real-time story, newly written by Souki Tsukishima, will progress alongside the timeline of the anime itself. It will follow in the footsteps of the main characters until the beginning of anime: Makoto, Sarah, and Jack. Portions of the characters story are located in portals at various places. There are 12 stories per each character (36 stories in total). Agents are encouraged to cooperate with their faction to collect the pieces to complete the stories. When gathered correctly, a passcode will be revealed. Unlocked stories will be released on the official website soon. The faction that first unlocks the stories will be rewarded. Release of the stories and the rule updates will be via the Ingress Anime official twitter account: https://twitter.com/IngressAnime. The competition has already begun. Help the Enlightened win the battle! P. S. Thanks to all the Agents who helped us to translate the article from Japanese! Jack's stories (Google translation is almost correct) (from post on Ingress Anime Telegram group) ①：『闘争』"Struggle" ②：『懐疑』"skepticism" ③：『信義』"faithfulness" or "honestly" ④：『追憶』"Remembrance" ⑤：『転機』"turning point" ⑥：『使命』"Mission" ⑦：『兵器』"Weapons" ⑧：『敵襲』"Enemy attack" ⑨：『作戦』"Operation" ⑩：『兵器』"Weapons" ⑪：『暗黒』"Darkness" ⑫：『前哨』"Outpost" Sarah's stories ①：『サラの遺言』 Sarah's last message ②：『彼女の見てきた世界』 The world she had watched ③：『視界が開けた時』 When the visibility breaks ④：『変わりゆく世界』 A changing world ⑤：『新たな道標』 The new signpost ⑥：『劉天華という男』 The man named Liu Tianhua ⑦：『損なわれた人々』 The people who had wounded ⑧：『再生する魂』 The soul to reproduce ⑨：『湧き上がる疑念』 Doubt to spring up ⑩：『闇への入口』 The entrance to darkness ⑪：『邪悪の中で』 In the evil ⑫：『そして彼女は戦場に』 And then she goes to battlefield ①：『翠川誠の憂鬱』 Midorikawa Makoto's melancholy (Below, I omit all "Makoto's~") ②：『翠川誠の転身』 Transformation (or Turning) ③：『翠川誠の追憶』 Reminiscence ④：『翠川誠の事件』 Incidents ⑤：『翠川誠の邂逅』 Encounter ⑥：『翠川誠の飛行』 Flight (or Flying) ⑦：『翠川誠の捜査』 Investigation ⑧：『翠川誠の能力』 Ability ⑨：『翠川誠の巡礼』 Pilgrimage ⑩：『翠川誠の疾走』 Sprint ⑪：『翠川誠の対決』 Confrontation ⑫：『翠川誠の宿命』 Fate

title: = Clues from Ingress =
text: = Clues from Ingress = All of these were obtained after hacking portals in Ingress Documents Pandora Original Link Media Item 2012-11-18 ((https://www.reddit.com/r/Ingress/comments/13f2ad/havent_seen_these_posted_yet/)) Media Item 2017-04-01 ((https://plus.google.com/u/0/+Ingress/posts/Ty7L7FPGsLn)) Unredacted Version An unredacted version can be seen in The Niantic Investigation 4 - Conspiracy 30 Oct 2012 here is a screenshot of the document (thanks Paul Gettle)) Sensitives Original link - Sensitives 1 L2 Media VERY_COMMON Original link - Sensitives 2 L3 Media VERY_COMMON There are a number of spelling errors in this document--whether these are intentional or not is unknown. They are as follows: Page 1, paragraph 3 - "ableit" instead of "albeit" Page 1, paragraph 3 - "beleive" instead of "believe" Page 1, paragraph 4 - "personna" instead of "persona" Page 2, paragraph 1 - "resemblence" instead of "resemblance" The Circle symbol can be seen on the second page, overlaid upon the center of the Niantic logo. This document mentions two projects other than Niantic--Project Whydah (also mentioned in the 11/5/2012 Word of the Day as the last known project of the NIA) and the Marie Celeste project. The Niantic, the Whydah Gally, and the Mary Celeste (referred to fictionally as the Marie Celeste) were all oceangoing ships. Page 2, paragraph 2 is about Yuri Alaric Nagassa, a physicist that "the NIA has been monitoring on the guest lecture circuit". This could be the Professor referenced in the Abduction news clipping and part 3 of the Niantic Investigation video. Gone Original link L4 Media VERY_COMMON This document is identical to the Nov. 20 document from nianticproject.com, except the hidden code is missing from this document, minor differences from the compression algorithms (png vs jpg) and minor differences in EXIF information. Video XM Data Signal Video Hidden Info During this video one can see 8 glyphs (the last 3 a repetion of the same), that last for 2 frames each On the right there is the translation of the glyphs showed in the Omnivore document. The bold words are meanings not used in the Omnivore document. Open All Pursue ? - Enlighten / Enlightened Liberate Government / City / Civilization - Structure Attack - war Attack - war Attack - war Also thanks to Greg Kru it was possible to get piano-like notes each time a glyph shows up Curious info this movie lasts 8 seconds , has 8 glyphs and was released on the 8/8/13 Audio Hollis part 5 Original link Hollis part 7 Original link JAR-#-36 These are a set of 36 files that started showing up from hacking on the 15th of August. For more info please go here Chatlogs Replicated Original Link Chatlog between Lynton-Wolfe and Bogdanovich Eureka Original link Knockdown Original link Level 5 Resonators Original link Images Epiphany Original link L1 Media VERY_COMMON The long hallway, pipes, and octagonal structure of the glowing machine in the background of the image resemble the Large Hadron Collider at CERN. A human face can be seen at the center of the image. The three similar characters facing front have a similar pattern on their backs. Storyboards They are a series of drawings that were possibly made by Tycho. You can see them in their right reading order plus with some found via other ways here. The image to the left is specific to story board media files. title: investigation/marfa_tx
text: Marfa Texas According to Wikipedia, Marfa has relevance to the supernatural, modern art, as well as US Military operations. During WWII, thousands of pilots were trained in Marfa, and it was also the training site for US Army's Chemical mortar battalions. Today, Marfa is a tourist attraction, known for modern art of the Chinati Foundation, as well as for the phenomenon known as the Marfa Lights.

title: Krakow Pages
text: Krakow Pages Posted June 24, 2014 Original Link Synopsis Analysis Original Link The hidden manuscript is a copy of “The Black Stone” by Robert E. Howard. Scans of the 14 pages can be found in this album: Krakow Manuscript Please leave proposed changes or additions in the comments section or contact me. https://plus.google.com/u/0/108519370562974867702/posts Mostly complete transcription of the textual annotations: Page 1 foul things shapes from hell foul things lurk in dark corners foul things lurk in dark forgotten corners foul shapes foul shapes lurk in dark corner[s] dark forgotten corners shapes pent in hell in the darkest corners shapes foul shapes foul shapes from dark corners the gates will open bringing hell from (???) and foul shapes dr[ea]dful things which memory [i]n the dark forgotten (???) foul forgotten corners where the foul forgotten dark things lurk foul dark shapes Page 2 nameless / the ravings of secret societies... magnus taloned fingers… dragon claws? [k]eys keys open doors the gates to the dark place? objects of dark worship (left margin) why do they die? dark matters (right margin) a madman / metaphor? a nightmare? Page 3 dream myths archetypes written in verse a voice from somewhere else? (left margin) dark antiquity ancient horrors (right margin) monstrous nightmares / unravelling another voice Page 4 what was on the parchment? or were they not there at all? a manifestation of fear the power of decay all great poets are strange in their speech and actions (left margin) did the bodies disappear (right margin) no bones recovered… / a dragon burned down the castle walls and ended it all Page 5 demon haunted always imagined visions from without attraction to the same place built the house there have been passed into our memory from another time? (left margin) ances[tr]al knowledge (right margin) foul dreams… nightmares / how much of these stories Page 6 a kind of people that preceded the humans hieroglyphics? (left margin) octagon… a shape that could signify a doorway… a passageway (right margin) an ancient force and an ancient fear Page 7 babel? / of course they were not random the primal language [t]his was the true language of the ancients hopes that open the the door to dreams and nightmares (left margin) dreams spoken in shapes (right margin) a language of hopes and fears Page 8 building cities on a[nc]ient sites what was there before? choice of words... whispering darkness... the whispers we sense in the dark of night in nightmares (left margin) did they build whole cities just to send a message? (right margin) did the shado[w]s cast a message? Page 9 sensations… where are they coming from? awakening the doorway what comes through it? [a]rchaic ritual contains truth truth buried as myth (left margin) some kind of ritual (right margin) seeds of madness sown in the poet’s brain… in his mind Page 10 across space and time outside of our universe? or perhaps our dimension the music of demons awakening an infernal beast [o]f her movement op[en] the doorway and allow the e(?)f(?)r to come through? (left margin) again the shape… did the patterns (right margin) awakening fear the fear that was given to us Page 11 the priest became the thing they feared transition black to white dark to light fear to awakening the vision brings both (left margin) he turned into a dragon (right margin) primordial creatures haunters of men Page 12 are nightmares clearer than dreams? the secret contains the truth of the nightmare (left margin) the case contains the secret Page 13 the language begins to change the reader… it is not the words… it is the tongue in in which they are written a foreign language… what if the language was of older origins… beyond the threshold of this realm (left margin) he must bury the secret (right margin) whoever discovers the secret must bury it once more Page 14 old when arabia was young.... do they precede the dawn of mankind? keys keys to door[s] that open nightmares and dreams fears and hopes this is our guide we build palaces we create dragons (left margin) keys to doors Hidden Information Hidden Information Additional Information Dead_drop, Jun2014, Krakow_pages, Dragon

title: Dead Drops
text: Dead Drops Now and again there are puzzles that involve being in certain locals in the real world to collect what is now know as "dead drops" (name given due to the first of these occurrences ) Storyboards Paris On the 11th of January this post showed up in the Niantic Project google+ page. In the description there was a reference to lizard king’s doorway to the other side. This is a reference to Jim Morrison's from the Doors and to his grave Later access to the video of the retrieval was given to us by the Damien Mórka Video The content was given to us by Julien Lamy There were some passcodes and invites hidden in the docs (images below) Images Posters Normally displayed in promotional poster for Ingress in some comercial venue hinted by a clue. These codes do not give AP and are very short lived (very low amount of uses) Chrome Industries The first ever reference to a dead drop and that would give the name for them during the ARG was the Chrome Industries one. Players were given 4 locations and had to figure that what was common among them was the Chrome Industries shops. In this case there were no posters as this only started for later dead drops. More info here. Zipcar Original Document In all these coordinates there would be one poster in the zipcar shop that could be redeemed for items in Ingress. This was also the very first appearance of Hubert Farlowe. Jamba Juices Using the Operation Juice Club document as a start we can determine there is a dead drop in some Jamba juices shops (see below for estimate of their locations) Events During some Events some members of the Niantic team are around in some locations and help players with one use code cards that give specific items like Virus, Powercubes or Ultrastrikes Thanks to +Linda Besh for suppling this image. More of these cards can be seen in the inventory page.

title: The Past Never Dies
text: The Past Never Dies In October 2014 Red released a series of movies. They had all in common the fact they were a nursery rhyme sung by a female voice distorted in a creepy way. Each video would lead to a document that seems to reveal a bit about the other Wonderland characters 01 - It's Bitsy Spider Description i g r c m P O R r m u . o / Q p i This read from top to bottom leads to the link imgur.com/PQOpRir Hidden Info The tile in imgur is VQVMPYXAMDMVNWTTWEINQDMNAQFU Gronsfeld with 8 to get NINEHQPSEVENFOLLOWAFIVEFSIXM 9hqp7followa5f6m 02 - It's Raining it's Pouring Description 1w18577q-nibotpyrc/moc.lruynit Reverse for tinyurl.com/cryptobin-q77581w1. This will forward you to http://s29.postimg.org/nj031c2af/image.jpg Hidden Info The forwarder is actually a clue to another link https://cryptobin.org/q77581w1 Using the title of the video as a password reveals //And Shahrazad perceived the dawn of day and ceased saying her permitted say. 7z4ik92// This was a hint that the rest would come the next day (like the Shahrazad stories in Arabian Nights) 03 - Twinkle twinkle Little Star Description hAA1odWmocrugmi Reverse it to get imgurcomWdo1AAh. This leads to imgur.com/Wdo1AAh Hidden Info In the imgur page the description says qsunlpm Reverse. place under the string from 02 and read from top to bottom 7mzp4linku9s2q 04 - 3 Blind Mice Description http://imgur.com/ST8UD5I Hidden Info The image title is cazaRQ8T and the description says paste me. This leads to http://pastebin.com/cazaRQ8T The title of the pastebin is umvihlp and the content is This is part 1 of 4 . Because you know you just love to read messages from your Queen don't you ?

title: Google Plus
text: Google Plus Occasionally some passcodes show up in google+ that were not present in the puzzles of the corkboard. This page is meant to keep track of them ATTENTION - This is meant for passcodes only, not invites as these can be obtained from several ways and the puzzles might not be official Brandon Badger Brandon Badger occasionally releases passcodes. Wether he is aware of them or if they are shaper induced. Normally they seem to be powercube exclusives. 8th of May - 8ZB9DETECTIONQ229R Cheshire Cat Seems to know the answer to puzzles before anyone else and takes great pleasure in giving cryptic hints to people wanting a solve, it's profile can be found here The rumkin puzzle On the 31th of January this post, challenged players to choose a number. To pick the code that will be your fate Choose a number from one to eight Later the number decided was 3 Seems your fate you have decided Your decisions you have provided Let the race begin soon Under a number 3 moon﻿ After that the puzzle was presented on this post. Don’t try to skip it, or take any substitute Don’t try to bifid it, that is not very astute Don’t rotate or lean on any column No cryptogram will make this solemn Today there is no bacon on your screen But here is a code that is new to the scene 9 major steps will have to be taken Hope that does not leave you shaken The cat’s breed is well known The number you chose, the tone Try and get it before you go numb Or just get drunk with this bottle of RUM N3qvraKeN2Kmo2WdlCUqxkr1 Hidden Info Take the original code and run it through each of the ciphers below on decrypt, using the passphrase cheshire and a key of 3, when necessary (b=0). 1) Affine 2) Atbash 3) Base 4) Caesar 5) Gronsfield 6) OTP 7) Playfair 8) Railfence 9) Vigenere﻿ This gives you the passcode 3uh3spacetimeu5p3q.
