text: Untitled (01/2014) 01/01/2014 MATRIOSHKA BRAIN A megastructure of immense computational capacity using a Dyson sphere system for energy. One potential use would be to run uploads of human minds into virtual reality spaces. Often seen as an alternative to the Jupiter Brain. Hidden Info t.Zw.Ane.AfBp.owxoD. Do a pyramid: 1 char, 2 chars, etc. . The bottom row, read right-left, becomes the first column, top to bottom. (the dots should now be on TOP of each column. Now, apply a shift to each row of letters, according to the row number (D shift 1, op shift 2, etc.). Capital letters become the numbers (E > 5, F > 6). Put it all together, read left to right, top to bottom 5qra5hajrat665y 01/02/2014 GANZFELD EFFECT A phenomenon of perception caused by exposure to an unstructured, uniform stimulation field. It is the result of the brain amplifying neural noise in order to look for the missing visual (or audio) signals. It may be linked to the condition known as prisoner's cinema as well as other phenomena. title: The Shaping Spreads (02/2013)
text: The Shaping Spreads (02/2013) 02/01/2013 COVCOM A code word signifying a Covert Communication. 02/02/2013 NONCONSCIOUS Mental functions that are not available to consciousness or memory Hidden Info Found in the source is the following 411350901 000411511 000611501 511050901 711550211 101811501 511011101 790811250 Reverse this string, dividing it into groups of 3 removing all groups that end up being 000 and then convert from decimal to ASCII. 4va ens ive p7u m2s it sr m5r Split into 2 groups of 4, interleave them: 4vam2sensitivesrp7um5r Remove the spurious ‘m’ instances: 4va2sensitivesrp7u5r This next part is a stretch. The P7 is a 9mm handgun. Replace it with 9. 4va2sensitivesr9u5r 02/03/2013 PROFILE The sum of all aspects of an operative or target's overt physical and behavioral persona. Hidden Info The text bxt4t4t4bxt4b4bxbxb4bxbxb4txb4t4bxbxt4t4txbxt4txb4t4bxt4b4bxbxtxb4bxtxbxtxtxbxt4b4bxtxb4txtxb4txt4b4t4bxt4b4bxtxb4t4t4txt4txb4t4bxtxb4bxtxt4t4bxt4t4bxt4bxbxbxb4 is hidden. Encrypting with a railfence of 2 we get btttbtbbbbbbbtbtbbtttbttbtbtbbbtbbtbttbtbbtbttbttbtbtbbtbtttttbtbtbbtttbttbtbbbbx444x44xx4xx4x44xx44xx4x44x44xxx4xxxxxx44xx4xx4x444x44xx444x4x44xx4xx44x44x4xxx4 Substitute the letters for binary values like this b => 0, t => 1, x => 0, 4 => 1 And divide in groups of 5 Dividing the result from bt and x4 and converting to ASCII we obtain npbsvtimevtwzsvp and nyesevdarkvnvivq Then just replace n => 9, sv => 7, tw => 2, iv => 4 to get the two passcodes - 9ye7darkv9v4q and 9pb7timev2z7p 02/04/2013 OWVL One Way Voice Link. A shortwave radio link used to transmit a prerecorded and enciphered message to an operative in a hostile area.. Hidden info Found in the source code - z5.w=uved4au9 Reverse to 9ua4devu=w.5z First number is 9. Replace = with 9 (same as first number) Second number is .5. Replace .5 with 2 (0.5 x 4 - the second number is 2) We get another passcode - 9ua4blackdevu9w2z 02/05/2013 PSYCHOMETRICS The area of psychology focused on mental testing. Hidden Info The string 16UM7DLVLFIDF10F19R is hidden Converting the numbers to letters -> PUMGDLVLFIDFJFSR Applying a affine of 3 and 3 -> EXDBAUGUSTASCSFW letters to numbers in relevant slots we get a new passcode - 5xd2augustas3s6w 02/06/2013 NO COMEBACKS Carrying out an assassination in such a manner that it can not be traced back to the agency ordering the hit. A clean hit. 02/07/2013 PLASMA From the intelligence world. A secret technique or mechanism for defeating a lock. 02/08/2013 RESIDUAL Traces that an operation has taken place. No residual means that there is no trace of the operation. 02/09/2013 ASSEMBLAGE Artifacts discovered together and presumed to have been used at the same time or for similar tasks. 02/10/2013 THE EYE A surveillance team operative who has the target under visual observation at any given moment in time. 02/11/2013 IN SITU Latin for In Position. In archaeology, to signify the study of an object unmoved from its original position. 02/12/2013 PHOTINT Photographic Intelligence, renamed IMINT (Image Intelligence). Usually involves high-altitude reconnaissance image gathering using spy satellites, aircraft or UAVs. 02/13/2013 FREE ASSOCIATION A mental exercise in which a person gives a running account of their thoughts, wishes, physical sensations, and any mental images as they are occurring. 02/14/2013 SUN TZU A famous Chinese general. He authored the book The Art of War in about 400 B.C.E 02/15/2013 PRESQUE VU The moment just prior to experiencing an epiphany Hidden Info In the source you can find <span style=”color:#aca69a; line-height:3px; font-size:3px; letter-spacing:-2px;”> 1331233333231313 6616840444856366 3100997936950794 Read by column 163 361 310 ...... Add 2 to each number 165 363 312 ..... Divide by 3 55 121 104 .... Convert from decimal to ascii to get: 7yh6augustaw6q9z Replace “augusta” with her last name and you get a new passcode 7yh6byronw6q9z 02/16/2013 RATIONALIZATION A mental defense mechanism, described by Freud, by which logic is used to explain away irrational behavior. 02/17/2013 MISDIRECTION A staple tactic for conjurers and magicians. In counterintelligence, it refers to the providing of a plausible explanation for an event caused by something else. 02/18/2013 IN EXTREMIS An exceptionally urgent situation requiring that immediate action be taken to minimize loss of life. 02/19/2013 THE SOLVE The solution to a specific puzzle or problem. Any solve properly understood will lead to more questions. 02/20/2013 HARBINGER A forerunner who hints at the coming of a future event. 02/21/2013 BARYOGENESIS Refers to the as yet unresolved process in physics that results in our universe appearing to contain much more matter than anti-matter. 02/22/2013 IN THE WIND When a target of surveillance has escaped and cannot be tracked further. 02/23/2013 EXFILTRATION A clandestine operation designed to get an operative out of danger. 02/24/2013 QUASIPARTICLES An effect by which particles traveling through solids can behave as though they were particles with completely different properties traveling through free space. Hidden Info In the source 824046glitchy19094373 (UNSOLVED) 02/25/2013 BEDLAM Confusion, chaos and uproar. The word derives from Bethlem Royal Hospital, a treatment facility for the insane founded in the 13th century Hidden Info In the source you can find <span style="letter-spacing:4px; font-size:2px; color:#aaa494">7d6db9ab3a6187ca6ea76b65 02/26/2013 MAGNETIC MONOPOLE A theorized particle with properties like a magnet with only one of a "north" or "south" end. Was thought to have been detected on Valentine's Day, 1982 at Stanford University, but no experiment has ever been able to reproduce this detection. 02/27/2013 WINDOW DRESSING Ancillary details included in an intelligence operation to convince observers that what they are seeing is real. 02/28/2013 PRONOIA The opposite of Paranoia. A suspicion that a conspiracy exists to aid and benefit you.

title: Shifting Alignments (03/2013)
text: Shifting Alignments (03/2013) 03/01/2013 JAMAIS VU The feeling that something previously experienced is being encountered for the first time. The opposite of deja vu. 03/02/2013 MOUTON A CINQ PATTES A french idiom, literally translating to 'a sheep with five legs'. Something that either does not exist, or is so rare as to be an anomaly. 03/03/2013 PORTMANTEAU A combination of two or more words into a single new word that combines their sound and meaning. First used in this context in the book Through the Looking-Glass. 03/04/2013 METHOD OF LOCI MEMORY PALACE A mnemonic device first seen in ancient Roman and Greek texts, it is a method of memory retrieval which uses visualization and geo-spacial mechanics to store, organize and recall memories and information. 03/05/2013 GREEN FLASH An optical phenomena that occurs in the seconds directly before sunrise or after sunset. A green spot becomes visible above the sun for a few seconds. 03/06/2013 COLD DARK MATTER A form of matter that interacts very weakly with light waves, currently estimated to be 5 times as numerous in our universe than "normal" matter. Has not yet been directly detected, but is required to explain many phenomena seen in astrophysics. 03/07/2013 PMC Private Military Company A modern iteration of the concept of mercenaries, PMCs offer trained and armed experts in intelligence, combat and security to their clients. Hidden Info In the source you can find 201-240-21-13-12-25-1303004701 Currently unsolved 03/08/2013 THE JAMES WEBB SPACE TELESCOPE A large infrared telescope, designed to be the Hubble telescope's successor. The telescope is expected to launch in 2018. A full scale 'model' of the telescope will be on display from 03/08 to 03/10 at SXSW, just minutes from the Stevie Ray Vaughan Statue. Chatter suggest this may not be a coincidence, and an ulterior purpose may be at play. Talks taking place surrounding the exhibit include 'Are we Alone?' and 'Unravelling Cosmic Mysteries.' 03/09/2013 BLACK DROPS Covert deliveries made to operatives in the field, usually using an Aerial Delivery System. 03/10/2013 ASOMATOUS Not existing in physical form. Having no material body. 03/11/2013 CONCEALMENT DEVICE An innocuous device used to surreptitiously transport and store materials relating to an intelligence operation. 03/12/2013 TRANSMUNDANE Existing beyond the physical or visible world. Hidden Info In the source you can find 217764087199221918551921258823542067183128190905144990418147191417312419150806241907744708181731721516361129 Using the hint 3 and 2 you can order the numbers like this 21 77 64 08 71 99 22 19 18 55 19 21 25 88 23 54 20 67 18 31 28 19 09 05 14 49 90 41 81 47 19 14 17 31 24 19 15 08 06 24 19 07 74 47 08 18 17 31 72 15 16 36 11 29 If added by column we obtain 54 116 98 51 99 111 110 115 116 114 117 99 116 117 56 121 55 115 Just convert from decimal to ASCII and we get 6tb3constructu8y7s 03/13/2013 BOSE-EINSTEIN CONDENSATE A special state of matter entered by gasses when cooled to slightly above absolute zero, where the individual quantum states of each atom collapse into each other and the system of atoms forms a single, coherent quantum system. 03/14/2013 HYPERTHREADING An as of yet unexplained dualization/transportation of one's XM essence to another position in spacetime. Niantic researchers have hypothesized that an extreme hyper-sensitive may be able to extend XM hyperthreading to their physical form, existing in two positions simultaneously. This remains unproven, and largely in the realm of pseudo-science. 03/15/2013 CLAIRVOYANCE The use of extrasensory perception to gain quick, intuitive knowledge about a person or object. 03/16/2013 IMPOSSIBLE Something that cannot be done 03/17/2013 PACHA World-Moment An Incan concept describing the structure of the cosmos that included both space and time as part of a single system. 03/18/2013 PRESTIDIGITATOR An expert in deception and sleight of hand trickery. A magician. 03/19/2013 MENTALISM A field within magic performance covering feats of the mind, including telepathy, clairvoyance, divination and mind control. 03/20/2013 GHOST SURVEILLANCE Discreet but omnipresent information gathering systems, working entirely outside of the view of the surveillance target. 03/21/2013 TIME DILATION In Einstein's theory of relativity, objects accelerated to a high speed compared to an external observer and then decelerated behave as if time had moved more slowly than the objects which remained at rest with respect to the observer. 03/22/2013 BLETCHLEY PARK An estate in Buckinghamshire, England that served as one of the primary code-breaking centers for the Allied effort during WWII. The high level intel decoded at Bletchley Park was classified as ULTRA, and it has been argued that without the ULTRA intelligence, the war would have been longer and its outcome uncertain. 03/23/2013 CHRONOSTASIS The perception of time standing still. 03/24/2013 SELCOUTH Unfamiliar, strange, rare, marvelous and wonderful. 03/25/2013 PERSISTENT SURVEILLANCE An information collection system that remains in a state of constant monitoring in order to detect, locate, identify, track and characterize its subject at an extremely high level of detail. title: The Dispersal (04/2013)
text: The Dispersal (04/2013) 04/01/2013 WHITEWASH To cover up an unpleasant truth through the use of a politically biased investigation or the presentation of skewed data. 04/02/2013 TRANSMUTATION The state of transitioning from one form to another. 04/03/2013 IPSEITY A selfhood or individual identity. 04/04/2013 DOG WHISTLE From the intelligence world. A public communication only heard by those who are 'tuned in' to hear it. 04/05/2013 INQUISITION A prolonged period of intensive questioning, investigation and official inquiry. 04/06/2013 FIGHT/FLIGHT RESPONSE An innate physiological response that automatically prepares a living being to "fight" or "flee" from a perceived threat. 04/07/2013 ANTAEUS From Greek and Berber mythos. A half-giant who would challenge all comers to wrestling, and was undefeatable as long as his feet were touching the ground. Heracles discovered this weakness, raised him into the air and crushed him. 04/08/2013 INSTRUMENTAL AGGRESSION A form of aggression directed toward achieving a specific goal. Any harm that is caused to others in the pursuit is incidental and not the primary objective. In the other form of aggression (hostile aggression), the goal is to cause harm as opposed to achieve something. 04/09/2013 BAYESIAN NETWORK A networked relationship of variables indicating their probability-based inter-dependencies on each other. Events cannot be predicted beyond this point in time. 04/13/2013 EXOCORTEX A theorized external technological system that could augment a biological brain's cognitive functioning. 04/14/2013 METAPHYSICS A branch of philosophy concerned with the fundamental nature of reality, existence, causality, and truth. 04/15/2013 PERSUASION Deliberate efforts by an entity to cause another's attitude to change. 04/16/2013 PROTO-HUMAN LANGUAGE A hypothetical single ancient language from which all current languages are descended. If the hypothesis is believed to be true, this language would have existed anywhere from 50,000 to 200,000 years ago. 04/17/2013 MACHINATION An involved and intricately crafted plot designed to achieve a specific objective. 04/18/2013 ETHOS The guiding beliefs and moral nature of an individual entity.312 04/19/2013 QUARANTINE From the Italian word 'quarantena,' referring to the 40-day period ships coming from other countries needed to remain in port before unloading to prevent the spread of the plague. 04/20/2013 STRATAGEM A ruse or trick used to outwit an opponent or achieve a goal. 04/21/2013 COUP D'TAT From the French phrase 'a blow against the state,' a coup d'‚tat is the sudden overthrow of an established body (usually a government) by another group. 04/22/2013 PROCESS OF ELIMINATION An iterative process by which an option with the highest probability of being correct can be selected from a list by removing the least likely candidate until only a single option remains. 04/23/2013 OBLIVION A state of being unaware or forgotten. 04/24/2013 WHISTLEBLOWER A person who informs an authority figure about dishonest, illegal or unethical activities. 04/25/2013 ZUGZWANG A situation where one's only move is to put oneself at further, decisive, disadvantage. Often encountered in chess games. 04/26/2013 MUNGE To repeatedly modify data to the point that it is difficult or impossible to use. 04/27/2013 EXODUS A departure of people en masse from a single location. 04/28/2013 SUPERLUNARY Belonging to a higher world; celestial. 04/29/2013 TIGER TEAM A team of highly skilled, imaginative and intelligent specialists brought together to investigate and solve a difficult set of technical or systemic problems. 04/30/2013 DYNAMIC INCONSISTENCY The change of an individual's strategy or preferences based on new circumstances in such a manner that their current decisions are inconsistent with their previous choices.

title: The Equation Changes (05/2013)
text: The Equation Changes (05/2013) 05/01/2013 ZEIGARNIK EFFECT A form of memory bias, this psychological theory implies that people remember unfinished tasks more effectively than those that have been completed. 05/02/2013 NEPENTHE A potion prepared in ancient times to induce forgetfulness of pain or sorrow; something capable of causing oblivion to suffering. 05/03/2013 DUNBAR'S NUMBER The suggested upper-limit of people with whom one can maintain a stable relationship. This group defines one's primary social network, and thus are the primary influences on an individual's thinking and behavior. 05/04/2013 POSTHUMAN A hypothetical future being whose basic capabilities would radically exceed those of a human. 05/05/2013 CONGLOMERATE A group of corporations pursuing different businesses that are bound together under a single parent company. 05/06/2013 EIDOS The distinct expression of the intellectual character of a culture or group. 05/07/2013 HYPERREALITY A hypothetical inability to differentiate reality from a simulation of reality. 05/08/2013 LODESTAR A guiding principle or light. 05/09/2013 COEVOLUTION The influence of two species upon each other's evolution caused by their intertwined relationship. 05/10/2013 PANOPTICON A circular building with a central viewing station from which an observer may monitor every inhabitant without them knowing if they are being watched. 05/11/2013 RENAISSANCE From the French 're-birth,' and Italian 'to be reborn.' A cultural movement beginning in the 14th century where art and literature flourished across a large section of Europe. 05/12/2013 GRAPHEME The smallest meaningful unit within a system of writing. 05/13/2013 CONNECTIONISM A system of thinking that models mental and behavioral phenomena as emerging from networks of simple units. 05/14/2013 MEMORY HOLE A mechanism for altering or removing evidence from a public repository in such a manner as to suggest it never existed. A concept popularized by George Orwell's Nineteen Eighty-Four. 05/15/2013 PROGRESS TRAP A condition societies experience when unsolvable problems are introduced through the pursuit of progress, leading to social collapse. 05/16/2013 EYEWALL A ring of towering thunderclouds surrounding the eye; a region where the most severe weather in a storm occurs. 05/17/2013 PRESCIENCE The power to see the future. 05/18/2013 HABITATION The process of adapting to an environment. 05/19/2013 LONG-TERM POTENTIATION A long-lasting enhancement in transmission between neurons resulting from stimulating them simultaneously. 05/20/2013 RINT RINT, or Radiation Intelligence, is information gathered by exploiting the unintentional radiation created by computers, data connections and electrical equipment. 05/21/2013 IN THE BLACK From the intelligence world. To be surveillance-free for a period greater than a few seconds. 05/22/2013 RHIB Rigid-Hulled Inflatable Boat. A light-weight, high performance and high-capacity inflatable boat frequently used for military and intelligence operations. 05/23/2013 ESCHATOLOGY A branch of theology concerned with the final destiny of humankind. 05/24/2013 FERMI'S PARADOX The contradiction between the high probability estimates for the existence of other intelligences, and humanity's lack of contact with, or evidence for, such. 05/25/2013 CUNEIFORM A language expressed as a series of pictographs. The earliest known form of writing. 05/26/2013 MEDIOCRITY PRINCIPLE The philosophical principle that there is nothing unusual about the evolution of the Solar System, Earth, humanity, or any nation of people. 05/27/2013 PSYCHOLINGUISTICS The study of the relationships between language and psychological processes. 05/28/2013 BLACK SWAN THEORY A metaphor describing an event that is unexpected and has a major impact on the course of history, and is incorrectly rationalized as something predictable in hindsight. 05/29/2013 CENOTAPH A tomb erected for individuals buried elsewhere. 05/30/2013 VIRAL PHENOMENON An object or pattern able to replicate itself or convert other objects into a copy of itself when they are exposed to it. 05/31/2013 NEXUS A connection or series of connections between multiple ideas or things.

title: A Coded Threat (06/2013)
text: A Coded Threat (06/2013) 06/01/2013 EXPERIMENTAL ARCHAEOLOGY Scientific studies designed to discover processes that produced and/or modified artifacts and sites. 06/02/2013 QUANTUM MIND A hypothesis proposing that quantum mechanics, such as quantum entanglement and super-position, can help explain the nature of consciousness. 06/03/2013 EPIPHENOMENON A secondary phenomenon that occurs along with or in parallel to a primary phenomenon. 06/04/2013 CAUSALITY The relationship between two events, the cause and the effect, wherein the second event is seen as a consequence of the first. 06/05/2013 YANTRA A Sanskrit word meaning instrument or machine. Often expressed as a geometric pattern or symbol designed to unlock the mind. 06/06/2013 TECHNOLOGICAL ESCALATION A situation where two or more parties resort to continuous technological improvement in an attempt to defeat each other. 06/07/2013 SYZYGY The alignment of three celestial bodies, such as the sun, moon, and earth during a solar or lunar eclipse. 06/08/2013 MOKSHA Liberation from samsara (the eternal circle of life and death). 06/09/2013 TULPA THOUGHTFORM An item or being which is materialized by thought and discipline alone. 06/10/2013 HUMINT Intelligence-gathering by covert agents or other human intelligence assets. 06/11/2013 APHORISM A concisely and cleverly expressed observation which contains a general subjective truth, eg. "All war is based on deception." - Sun Tzu 06/12/2013 MANTRA From the Sanskrit 'Manas' - mind and 'Trayate' - to free. A repeated statement designed to enable transformation of the consciousness. 06/13/2013 MULTIVERSE A hypothetical set of multiple, or perhaps infinite, parallel universes containing all possible alternate configurations of reality. In a multiverse, the universe we experience is only one instance; one particular configuration of a massive set of variables. 06/14/2013 OCCAM'S RAZOR A principle designed to enable simple solutions to complex logical problems. When multiple possible explanations for a phenomenon exist, the explanation requiring the fewest assumptions should be selected. 06/15/2013 MIND-BODY PROBLEM The philosophical problem of how the material brain interacts with the immaterial consciousness. 06/16/2013 FUTUROLOGY The study of predicting possible futures and the worldviews and myths that support them. 06/17/2013 COUNTERFACTUAL HISTORY A form of historical study that attempts to answer 'What if?' questions by imagining a timeline in which a key historical event either did not occur or had a different outcome. 06/18/2013 BUTTERFLY EFFECT A small change at one place in a system resulting in massive differences at a later state. 06/19/2013 LOCKSTEP Intelligence community lingo. When a surveillance team is following so close on foot they seem to be moving in lockstep with the target. 06/20/2013 WERNICKE'S AREA An area of the human brain involved in the understanding of written and spoken language 06/21/2013 BRUSH PASS A method of exchanging something covertly. Two agents walk past each other, surreptitiously passing an item from one person to another as they pass. 06/22/2013 GREY MARKET The trade of items through channels which, while legal, are unauthorized and unintended by the original creator of the items. 06/23/2013 LEVERAGE The ability to, during a negotiation, influence the other party or parties to move closer to one's own desired position. 06/24/2013 SWOT ANALYSIS An evaluation tool utilizing a 2x2 matrix designed to help determine the Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities and Threats present in a venture, project or situation. 06/25/2013 WATCHWORD A word or phrase expressing a group's core ideology. 06/26/2013 SYMP A disparaging term for the Enlightened used by zealous Resistance agents, who view the Enlightened as Shaper sympathizers. 06/27/2013 BLACK CHAMBER A covert government office which intercepts suspicious mail, employing a team of cryptanalysts to decipher messages, a centuries-old practice. 06/28/2013 PORTER FIVE FORCES ANALYSIS An analysis framework designed to help determine the competitive intensity of a market by examining five key contributing factors, including the threat of new competitors arising, the bargaining power of buyers and suppliers, and competitive rivalry. 06/29/2013 SAPIR-WHORF HYPOTHESIS The idea that the structure of a language influences the way its speakers think and behave. 06/30/2013 PYRRHIC VICTORY A victory won at a terrible cost.

title: Dark Symbols (07/2013)
text: Dark Symbols (07/2013) 07/01/2013 EPISTOLARY Literary works presented in the form of letters. 07/02/2013 BIOINFORMATICS An interdisciplinary field utilizing engineering, complex systems, computer sciences and statistics to analyze biological data. 07/03/2013 GEOCONTOURGLYPH A petroglyph that includes a representation of the surrounding landscape. 07/04/2013 BICAMERALISM The hypothesis that the ancient human mind was divided into two parts: One which produced auditory hallucinations and the other which heard and obeyed them. 07/05/2013 IDEASTHESIA A condition in which a concept or mental impression evokes a sensory experience 07/06/2013 DEBRIEFING Conversational sessions that revolve around sharing and examining information after a specific event has occurred. 07/07/2013 EXOSOMATIC MEMORY The recording, storage, and recollection of past experiences by a system external to the human brain. 07/08/2013 ICONIC MEMORY A visual memory system; allows for large amounts of information to be stored for very brief durations. 07/09/2013 NOOLOGY The study of phenomena originating in the mind, including knowledge, intellect, and intuition. 07/10/2013 LOGOGRAM A symbol or sign which represents a whole word. 07/11/2013 CACHE A collection of items of the same type stored in a hidden or inaccessible place. 07/12/2013 HOLOPHRASIS Using a single word to express complex ideas, a phase in early childhood language development. 07/13/2013 EIDETIC MEMORY The ability to recall visual images with exceptional precision, also known as "photographic memory" or "total recall." 07/14/2013 GLOTTOCHRONOLOGY A method of statistically estimating when distinct languages diverged from their common source. 07/15/2013 ONTIC Having a physical or factual existence. 07/16/2013 DOUBLE AGENT Intelligence lingo. An agent under the control of another intelligence service being used against his or her original handlers. 07/17/2013 WATCHER TEAM From the intelligence world, a surveillance team assigned to monitor a specific target. 07/18/2013 ZIGGURAT An ancient Mesopotamian terraced step pyramid temple, believed to connect Heaven and Earth. 07/19/2013 MODISTAE A group of Medieval philosophers who categorized language into modes of being, understanding, and signifying. 07/20/2013 SYNTAGMA A sequence of linguistic units, such as words or phrases, which form a meaningful whole 07/21/2013 BIOLINGUISTICS The study of the relationship between biology and all aspects of language. Hidden Info WTTVUYWSISEMENCVX Atbash the first 5 letters and convert to numbers, reverse the rest, then merge DGGEF XVCNEMESISWY DXVCGNEMESISWGEFY 4xvc7nemesisw756y 07/22/2013 EX NIHILO Latin for 'from nothing.' Often used in philosophical and theological arguments centered around the issue of cause and effect. 07/23/2013 VERIDICAL DREAM A dream depicting a real event from the past, present, or future, though the dreamer has no knowledge of the event. 07/24/2013 HYPOCOGNITION The inability to express or comprehend a concept because one's language has no words to describe it. 07/25/2013 QUIPU Threads knotted in a positional decimal system, used to record numerical data and possibly language, in South America, as early as 2500-3000 B.C. 07/26/2013 DEAD MAN'S SWITCH A device or system that holds an automated task at bay as long as a physical operator is present preventing it from triggering. if the operator goes absent, the task triggers. 07/27/2013 PSYCHOGRAPHY Text written by a Writer who is guided by a spiritual or subconscious force, also known as "automatic writing." 07/28/2013 ARROW OF TIME The concept of the one-way directionality of time, used to describe irreversible processes in nature. 07/29/2013 SEMANTIC SATIATION A psychological phenomenon in which a constantly repeated word temporarily loses its meaning to the listener. 07/30/2013 MNEMOSYNE In Greek mythology, the personification of Memory and mother of the nine Muses, who were the goddesses of inspiration. Something to think about... 07/31/2013 AMODAL PERCEPTION The perception of an entire object when it can only be partially sensed.

title: The Janus Revelation (08/2013)
text: The Janus Revelation (08/2013) 08/01/2013 ULTRA A designation used by British Intelligence during World War II for highly classified intelligence, usually decrypted messages originally enciphered using the German Enigma machine 08/02/2013 APPERCEPTION Understanding a new experience by relating it to past experiences. 08/03/2013 LOST When your physical surroundings no longer match your mental map. 08/04/2013 LIMEN The threshold of psychological or physiological perception. 08/05/2013 EXOGENOUS Having an origin external to an organism. 08/06/2013 CREST The point on a wave where upwards velocity is at its maximum. 08/07/2013 SCORCHED EARTH A military strategy based on the wanton destroy of any and all infrastructure in order to render it useless to an enemy. 08/08/2013 CIPHER An algorithm for accurately and repeatedly encoding and decoding data or language. From the Arabic 'sifr,' meaning zero. It's hypothesized the word came to be used in this fashion as the concept of zero was cryptic and far fetched in medieval Europe. 08/09/2013 POLYSEMY The capability of a word, sign or symbol to have multiple potential meanings. 08/10/2013 ALETHIOLOGY The branch of philosophy that deals with the nature of truth. 08/11/2013 BEHAVIORAL CUSP A new behavior that has significant consequences because it exposes an organism to new environments or interactions. 08/12/2013 THYMOLOGY The historical study of how mental processes have determined human actions. 08/13/2013 CONVERGENCE ZONE An atmospheric region where two prevailing weather flows collide. 08/14/2013 FACT-VALUE DISTINCTION The difference between what we believe to be true and what we believe to be right. 08/15/2013 METOUSIOSIS From Greek. The transformation of one's nature. 08/16/2013 PRINCIPLE OF SUFFICIENT REASON The doctrine that there is an adequate explanation for the presence and attributes of everything that exists. 08/17/2013 ACOUSMATIC SOUND A sound that is heard, though the original source is unseen. 08/18/2013 EXISTENCE THEOREM In mathematics, the statement that an object exists, even if the means of finding the object are unknown. 08/19/2013 CARRIER SIGNAL A consistent stream of data designed to contain a message by being modulated against the message data over the course of a transmission. 08/20/2013 MIRROR NEURON A neuron that responds similarly when an animal acts or watches another animal performing the same action. 08/21/2013 TABULA RASA "Blank slate" in Latin. The mind in its originally clear state before being affected by impressions or experiences. 08/22/2013 PERFECT STORM An unusual combination of occurrences that cause a critical situation. 08/23/2013 CALL AND RESPONSE In music, a set of two tonal phrases in a piece of music. The second phrase is a musical response to the first. 08/24/2013 POLYTELY From Greek, meaning "many goals," when solving a complicated problem involves a number of concurrent objectives. 08/25/2013 SYNCHRONICITY A meaningful coincidence of events without a causal relationship. 08/26/2013 COLLECTIVE INTENTIONALITY When a group of people directs their thoughts or actions towards the same object or goal. 08/27/2013 REPRESENTATIVE REALISM The theory that our observations of the external world are our interpretations, rather than direct perceptions. 08/28/2013 DISTRIBUTED KNOWLEDGE When the partial knowledge of a individuals in a group results in a collective and complete awareness. 08/29/2013 STIGMERGY A spontaneous system of coordination between organisms, where residual traces left by one lead to the ensuing action of another. 08/30/2013 HOLISM The theory that systems in nature should be seen as interacting wholes that are greater than the sum of their individual parts. 08/31/2013 ANIMA MUNDI From Latin, the "World Soul," the idea that all living beings in our world are connected by a common spirit.

title: What is the Niantic Project (10/2013)
text: What is the Niantic Project (10/2013) 10/01/2013 This was the day PAC left the board. After this the WotD was picked up by Jojo Stratton an Ingress Player. Shortly after she had started this she got a sort of a blessing from the Niantic staff for it and her posts started including live passcodes. Due to that they are now posted below. 10/02/2013 Stopgap A temporary measure or short-term fix used until something better can be obtained. 10/03/2013 Fallibism The philosophical principle that human beings could be wrong about their beliefs, expectations, or their understanding of the world, and yet still be justified in holding their incorrect beliefs 10/04/2013 Biometrical Optical Surveillance System (BOSS) A visual identification system, the most common of which is facial recognition, but "movement recognition", wardrobe recognition, tattoo recognition are also available. Hidden Info on the bottom 529111-059161-161131-018115-101155-510115-341005 10/05/2013 VON RESTORFF EFFECT The tendency to remember distinctive items among an otherwise seemingly homogeneous group of clues. Hidden Info 00700005004500440040606404040504000500040404050044750400050500604070047005053 Convert each digit to binary without zero padding, join string, groups of 8 8rrb3deaddropu299w 10/06/2013 ZWISCHENZUG A chess tactic in which a player, instead of playing the expected move first interposes another move, posing an immediate threat that the opponent must answer. Derived from the practice of early cartographers placing dragons and monsters in uncharted areas of maps. Decimal to ascii to get 6syc4molex664y 10/09/2013 Jumping Streams Varying your pattern in such a way as to attract attention from a neutral surveillance system Hidden Info ABBACBBAAACABBBBCABBBBCBBABCAABCABCBACAABACAABACBBBCAAAACBAAAACAABCBAACBAACAAAAB Reverse, ABC => dot, dash, space, Morse decode to 6uud4hollandy993p 10/10/2013 Declaration of Helsinki A set of ethical principles regarding human experimentation developed for the medical community by the World Medical Association (WMA). It is widely regarded as the cornerstone document of human research ethics Hidden Info 032.203.303.300.023.230.212.213.230.212.131.032.032.033.332 Convert each digit to two-bit binary, stack the bits in each group of 3 in a 3x2 grid. Braille and you get 6uxc8hozhow667q 10/11/2013 SYNCRETISM the combining of different, often seemingly contradictory beliefs, merging and analogizing originally discrete traditions and schools of thought. Hidden Info 34.156.156.13.346.14.1256.1235.135.145.1345.14.1345.1235.345.3456.3456.235 Label the 6 braille positions 1-6 from left to right, top to bottom. Each group of digits correspond to a braille character to get 3uub4explorerp677s 10/13/2013 METANOIA In psychology, denotes a process of reforming the psyche as a form of self healing, a proposed explanation for the phenomenon of psychotic breakdown; often viewed as a productive process. Hidden Info 7vrc7is7e2wxstw8me Rows of 6, reverse middle row. Read diagonally to get 7wwc7extremisv287s 10/14/2013 INFORMATION OVERLOAD Refers to the difficulty a person can have understanding an issue and making decisions that can be caused by the presence of too much information (A.K.A.infoxication). The programming language created was called Ada. Solitons are caused by a cancellation of nonlinear and dispersive effects in the medium. May occur in proteins and DNA. title: = Sphere of Weirdness (11/2012) =
text: = Sphere of Weirdness (11/2012) = 11/01/2012 Conspiracy Board aka Investigator Board A board, sometimes physical, sometimes digital which is used by an investigator to 'connect the dots' in a conspiracy which has several different, seemingly unrelated individuals and activities. 11/02/2012 BLACKDEV A secret device, often created by an intelligence agency whose existence is denied or disavowed. 11/03/2012 Deep Throat A secret informant with intimate knowledge of a situation. From the Book "All The President's Men" by Woodward and Bernstein. 11/04/2012 Ingress A means or place of entering. 11/05/2012 > NIANTIC > Word of unknown significance. A project controlled by the > NIA. Last known project, Project Whydah. Mission > unknown. 11/06/2012 > P.S.D. > Personal Surveillance Device > It used to be 'wearing a wire' or a hidden camera. With > the advent of cell phones, nearly everybody has one. Hidden information At the bottom of the page the following text appears: > Rme syufram ni gs qdw rm amzsmnikw szsk mssese ni hs xdalsfse amni lnims bik rff nags. Mi, A > ndamv an al amluakrnaim ndrn qrl xrunokse hw ndsls rmxasmn gamel. Qdafs A xrmmin ukizs > an, ik szsm ukslsmn r qikvamc dwuindslal, goxd fsll r nsln, A lolusxn ndrn qkanamc anlsfb gacdn > drzs hssm r nkrmleagsmlaimrf cabn... > > Xsknramfw an xrmmin hs esmase ndrn nds aesr ib ukslskzamc ndiocdn bik uilnskanw drl hssm > dsfubof ni iok Ldrusk bkasmel. > > Synkrxn bkig Xrkkas Xrguhsff Marmnax Ukipsxn Fic This translates to: And explain to me why an inventory ever needed to be chiseled into stone for all time. No, I think it is inspiration that was captured by these ancient minds. While I cannot prove it, or even present a working hypothesis, much less a test, I suspect that writing itself might have been a transdimensional gift… Certainly it cannot be denied that the idea of preserving thought for posterity has been helpful to our shaper friends. Extract from Carrie Campbell Niantic Project Log 11/07/2012 > Inverse surveillance > When those who are usually watched begin watching their > watchers. A form of Sousveillance. 11/08/2012 > URB Drone > Small drone used to spy on civilians. Considered to be a > Blackdev. Captured Urbdrones have been explained away > as toys. 11/09/2012 > Pareidolia > The human brain's ability to see patterns even if they are > suggested by the weakest of lines and shading. Hidden information > The apostrophe in "brain's" links to db2.mp3. 11/10/2012 > MOSAIC THEORY > The "mosaic theory" describes a basic precept of > intelligence gathering: Disparate items of information, > though individually of limited or no utility to their > possessor, can take on added significance when > combined with other items of information. Combining the > items illuminates their interrelationships and breeds > analytic synergies, so that the resulting mosaic of > information is worth more than the sum of its parts. 11/11/2012 > GHOSTING > * The act of being a ghost > * Writing or other creative work that appears under another name. > * A distorted image. > * An image that persists after the object has passed. 11/12/2012 > HUNCH > An intuitive feeling. A suspicion. Something that is strongly felt > but can not be rationally defended. 11/13/2012 > CLARKE'S 3RD LAW > Theory of Everything or Final Theory > Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable > from magic. 11/14/2012 > NON-BARKING DOG > A reference to the Sherlock Holmes story 'The Silver > Blaze' in which Holmes makes a deduction based on the fact > that a dog didn't bark, and thus knew the intruder. 11/15/2012 > XM > Exotic Matter >A transdimensional substance discovered as a byproduct of the Higgs Boson research at CERN. In theory, XM is both matter and energy, and simultaneously exists in multiple dimensions. Exact knowledge of the nature of XM is currently classified. 11/16/2012 > QUANTUM MECHANICS > Exotic Matter >The discovery that particles are discrete packets of > energy with wave-like properties led to the branch of > physics dealing with atomic and sub-atomic systems which > is today called quantum mechanics. 11/17/2012 > SENSITIVES > People who are 'sensitive' to the effects of Exotic Matter, > whatever those may be... Under this definition, in the margin there is hidden text that reads "UJZZ UBK6" Meaning is still unknown 11/18/2012 > RANDOMNESS > A non-order or non-coherence in a sequence of symbols > or steps, such that there is no intelligible pattern or > combination, eg. enlrau7iaon15vcld8 Hidden Info This is a combination of two codes, calvin57e and roland81u. 11/19/2012 > SHAPERS > Name ascribed to the patterns found to be emerging in > Exotic Matter which some believe to be indications of an > intelligence of unknown origin. 11/20/2012 SENSITIVE ARCHAEOLOGY Locating ancient sites by studying exotic matter cluster dispersal. Very weird stuff. Hidden information The x6w3w and 2uh2 are too small to read, but you can find them by copying the line or looking in the source. Switching them round and keeping exotic in the middle gives you 2uh2exoticx6w3w; a passcode for use in-game. 11/21/2012 > NUMINOUS PLACES > Places on the Earth previously associated with divine or > creative inspiration. Mystical Places. Most famous > numinous places have been mapped to Exotic Matter > anomalies. 11/22/2012 > QUANTUM TELEPATHY > Where do ideas come from? Inspiration. Some are > beginning to argue that Exotic Matter might explain > ephemeral mental states such as artistic inspiraton, ESP, > sudden scientific breakthroughs. Hidden information The E in "Exotic" is a hyperlink toThe Enlightened faction logo 11/23/2012 > ANALYTIC SYNERGIES > The more pieces of the puzzle you put together the easier > it is to place the next one. 11/24/2012 > VOX CLAMANTIS > The voice of one crying out. 11/25/2012 > BRAINWAVE > A sudden stroke of inspiration, formerly believed to have > come from the gods (see Afflatus), that reflects an idea > which seems to have no parent and no context. A new > idea. Hidden Information > The link has the tag 9zc2brain and url has wavez9p8r (which does not feature on the connected website) at the end. > Putting the 2 together you get 9zc2brainwavez9p8r which is a passcode. 11/26/2012 > TROJAN HORSE > A ruse which is invited into an environment because it > appears desirable, but actually contains hidden attackers. > From Homer's Odyssey. 11/27/2012 PANDORA According to Greek mythology, Pandora opened a jar and released all the evils of mankind into the world. Once she had closed the jar, only hope remained trapped within. 11/28/2012 MKOFTEN Defense project created to "explore the world of black magic" and "harness the forces of darkness and challenge the concept that the inner reaches of the mind are beyond reach." 11/29/2012 HUBRIS: Extreme pride. Arrogance. An overestimation of capabilities by someone in a position of power. 11/30/2012 NEMESIS: An enemy created out of Hubris.

Opposite of in-situ activity. From the film "Sybil". Hidden Info 6ssq6dJ3sbn3^nb299b Rotate each character 180 degrees to get 9ssb9presquevuq266q 11/09/2013 APOTHEOSIS The glorification of a subject to divine level. Hidden Info 3/cyemnetugvscihitstiryiaolzri 11/11/2013 TIN FOIL HAT A piece of headgear made from one or more sheets of aluminium foil or similar material. One may wear the hat in the belief that it shields the brain from electromagnetic fields, to prevent mind control and/or mind reading, or to limit the transmission of voices directly into the brain. Also used in descriptions of the soul/body. Thousands at his bidding speed w Lodg'd with me useless, though my soul more bent e "Doth God exact day-labour, light denied?" r I fondly ask. But Patience to prevent h Either man's work or his own gifts; who best x And that one talent which is death to hide 8 To serve therewith my Maker, and present s Ere half my days in this dark world and wide, 4 And post o'er land and ocean without rest: u They also serve who only stand and wait." 3 When I consider how my light is spent This is the sonnet When I Consider How My Light is Spent (On His Blindness) from John Milton. Ordering it by right order we get the following 3 When I consider how my light is spent s Ere half my days in this dark world and wide, x And that one talent which is death to hide w Lodg'd with me useless, though my soul more bent 8 To serve therewith my Maker, and present c My true account, lest he returning chide; e "Doth God exact day-labour, light denied?" r I fondly ask. Thousands at his bidding speed 4 And post o'er land and ocean without rest: u They also serve who only stand and wait." 3sxw8cernh4x4u 11/04/2015 WotD SHADOW ASPECT An unconscious aspect of the personality which the conscious ego does not identify in itself. Hidden Info That use is not forbidden usury, That thou consum'st thy self in single life? Is but the seemly raiment of my heart, Beauty o'er-snowed and bareness every where: And do whate'er thou wilt, swift-footed Time, O'ercharged with burthen of mine own love's might. And threescore year would make the world away. And make the earth devour her own sweet brood; For never-resting time leads summer on Then look I death my days should expiate. Sap checked with frost, and lusty leaves quite gone, Not from the stars do I my judgement pluck; Or say with princes if it shall go well The lovely gaze where every eye doth dwell, With April's first-born flowers, and all things rare, But thy eternal summer shall not fade, Thy self thy foe, to thy sweet self too cruel: When I behold the violet past prime, And threescore year would make the world away. With shifting change, as is false women's fashion: And in mine own love's strength seem to decay, Then the conceit of this inconstant stay Then being asked, where all thy beauty lies, Which happies those that pay the willing loan; By children's eyes, her husband's shape in mind: How can I then be elder than thou art? For never-resting time leads summer on Profitless usurer, why dost thou use Say that thou didst forsake me for some fault, The lines above are from several Shakespeare Sonnets. More exactly like the following (first number is the sonnet number the second the line number) 6~5 / 9~2 / 22~6 / 5~8 / 19~6 / 23~8 / 11~8 / 19~2 / 5~5 / 22~4 / 5~7 / 14~1 / 14~7 / 5~2 / 21~7 / 18~9 / 1~8 / 12~3 / 11~8 / 20~4 / 23~7 / 15~9 / 2~5 / 6~6 / 9~8 / 22~8 / 5~5 / 4~7 89 Using the sonnet numbers only (except last one) we get 6 9 22 5 19 23 11 19 5 22 5 14 14 5 21 18 1 12 11 20 23 15 2 6 9 22 5 4 Doing number to letter with a=1 we get fiveswksevenneuralktwobfived 5swk7neuralk2b5d Using the line numbers by pair (except in the last case where you use the sonnet number) we get 52 68 68 82 54 71 72 79 83 84 79 56 88 57 89 Decimal to ASCII gives 4ddr6ghosto8x9y 11/05/2015 WotD DELECTATION Delight, enjoyment. title: resources/words_of_the_day/12_2012
text: The Niantic Calamity (12/2012) 12/01/2012 BLACK OPERATIONS Covert operations by an intelligence agency that have no official owner, and can not be attributed to the organization in charge of them for security reasons. 12/02/2012 SPUKHAFTE FERNWIRKUNG Spooky Action at a Distance The interaction of objects that are separated by spacetime. Hidden Info In smaller letters we have the following 7pf7y4q3r which is followed by the text that are separated by spacetime. This is a hint for the passcode - 7pf7spacetimey4q3r. 12/03/2012 THEORY OF EVERYTHING A theory that fully explains and links together all known physical phenomena, and can predict the outcome of any experiment. Hidden Info In the source we have 7zh3CALVINq3t7w. This is for the passcode 7zh3ezekielq3t7w (Ezekiel is Calvin's first name) 12/04/2012 KIRLIAN PHOTOGRAPHY Photography that allegely showed `auras' around people's bodies. Some theorize that Exotic Matter visualization has its roots in Kirlian Photography. Hidden Info In the source code we got xqeplohltvfosrfmenwnfzqilkymcqoiaeiov. Using a vigenere solver with the word Kirlian (the WotD) we get ninedoubleugsevenconspiracyzsixxseven. There is one letter missing that was bruteforced to make the passcode 9wg7conspiracyz6x7r 12/05/2012 CONTROL In the intelligence field, the control is a person in charge of remotely providing DiRection to a team of Operatives usiNg some form of Electronic communication. Hidden Info Inside the source code you can find , After that there are some Capital letters that spell out the word DRONE This is a clue for a new passcode 4qe7droney2p8p. 12/06/2012 SAMSARA The Circle of life, death and rebirth to which the creatures of the world are bound. Hidden Info In the source code you can find evD6POi55YGfDIeyDdPxtZV If you vigenere with the word circle you get cnM6NDe55WYoBXawVmNmpXN Reversing it gives NXpmNmVwaXBoYW55eDN6Mnc Base to ASCII gives the passcode 5zf6epiphanyx3z2w Hidden Info 2 In the source , death and rebirth to which the creatures of the world are bound cleruptus is an anagram for sculpture So we can get 4yd5sculpturet6r2r 12/07/2012 PROJECT ARTICHOKE An early CIA 'mind control' program. The precursor to MKULTRA. Hidden Info In the source we have title="7vh9singersx2x3u" singers is an anagram for ingress so we have 7vh9ingressx2x3u A previous version of the source had title="vycviemc2uviuiiir" take v for 5 (like Roman numerals) vi for 6 and so on. einstein is referred to by emc2 , so we get 5yc6einsteinu6u3r 12/08/2012 DEAD DROP A way of using a secret location to exchange a physical object or piece of information during an espionage operation. The opposite of a live drop.. 12/09/2012 CRYPTOMNESIA Inadvertently plagiarizing somebody or something because you've forgotten the source. One of the most famous cases of cryptomnesia was of Paul McCartney going around asking people if they'd ever heard `Yesterday' before because it came so easily that he was convinced that he must have heard it before.operation. 12/10/2012 COMPROMISED When a secret operative's identity or operation is uncovered and cannot continue as planned. 12/11/2012 REMOTE VIEWING The paranormal ability of a subject to have an out-of-body view of a person, place, or moment in time without being physically present there. 12/12/2012 FUGUE STATE A mental state associated with a self-disappearance. 12/13/2012 SQUID Superconducting QUantum Interference Device Extremely sensitive detectors used by physicists to detect quantum level changes in magnetic flux. 12/14/2012 RATIOCINATION Ordered chain of logical thinking. 12/15/2012 ASEMIC WRITING A wordless form of writing. 12/16/2012 BLOWBACK The unexpected, and most often negative consequences experienced as the result of an intelligence operation. 12/17/2012 THE RABBIT In surveillance: The target of an operation. 12/18/2012 WAVE-FUNCTION COLLAPSE All particles exist as waves that contain information about many states that the particle can simultaneously be in until observation or measurement; at this point, all of the possible states of the particle are excluded except one randomly chosen one, which is the one observed. 12/19/2012 TURING TEST Named after Alan Turing. A test to determine if a computer can exhibit intelligence that is indistinguishable from a human. 12/20/2012 MKULTRA A notorious and massive CIA operation lasting 20 years with the goal of exploring 'behavioral engineering of humans.' 12/21/2012 NEOLITHIC REVOLUTION ~8000 BCE. The advent of agriculture, and the beginning of human civilization. 12/22/2012 ANFRACTUOSITY Having the quality of being winding, circuitous, or intricate. 12/23/2012 MOLE An agent within an organization who is tasked to disrupt the goals of that organization via intelligence leaks or sabotage. 12/24/2012 PROVOCATEUR An agent sent into a group of people with the objective of causing disruption and embarassment. Hidden Info when highlighted, underneath the definition you will find: .",:":",::""::.":".""::":,;.",;:."::,.",:".".",:":,;.":,:.".",:"."".":.":":".":;:"";:.".", 12/25/2012 PRETERNATURAL Outside of the ordinary course of nature. Exceptional or abnormal. Differs from 'supernatural' in that preternatural phenomena are believed to have rational explanations. 12/26/2012 TRANSDUCTION The conversion of a stimulus from one form to another as it travels a neural pathway. 12/27/2012 AMBIGUITY A perception that can be interpreted in more than one way. 12/28/2012 AGENT OF INFLUENCE An agent in a position of power who uses their influence and status to benefit the country or agency to whom they belong. 12/29/2012 ONE-TIME SOURCE A source of intelligence who can not be expected to provide information on a regular basis, either due to their limited knowledge or due to the extreme circumstances of contact. Hidden Info In a very small font size the following text is located directly after the title (One-Time Source) we have the following xWad3RIciSodwCIOiqYP which is This is a hint for the passcode - 12/30/2012 ANOMALOUS ACTIVITY Activity that is irregular or deviates unusually from what is expected; activity inconsistent with the norm. 12/31/2012 OBJECT PERMANENCE The idea that objects exist independently of one's action or awareness; a significant cognitive acquisition during infancy.

title: A
text: The idea is to make a small list of terms used by official Niantic sources that seem out of place and research what we can about them. A Alexander the Great http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87JR0NOpzZ0 C California Gold Rush Place(s) where it is mentioned OLW interview﻿ Definition The California Gold Rush (1848–1855) began on January 24, 1848, when gold was found by James W. Marshall at Sutter's Mill in Coloma, California.[1] The first to hear confirmed information of the Gold Rush were the people in Oregon, the Sandwich Islands (Hawaii), and Latin America, who were the first to start flocking to the state in late 1848. All told, the news of gold brought some 300,000 people to California from the rest of the United States and abroad.[2] Of the 300,000, approximately half arrived by sea and half came from the east overland on the California Trail and the Gila River trail. Source H Hydra Teeth Place(s) where it is mentioned Month of September title The teeth of the Hydra﻿ Definition Cadmus was the bringer of literacy, civilization, killed the sacred dragon that guarded the spring of Ares. The goddess Athena told him to sow the teeth, from which sprang a group of ferocious warriors called the spartoi. He threw a precious jewel into the midst of the warriors, who turned on each other in an attempt to seize the stone for themselves. The five survivors joined with Cadmus to found the city of Thebes. The classical legends of Cadmus and Jason have given rise to the phrase "to sow dragon's teeth." This is used as a metaphor to refer to doing something that has the effect of fomenting disputes.Source J Janus Place(s) where it is mentioned Month of August title The Janus Revelation.﻿ Definition In ancient Roman religion and myth, Janus (Latin: Ianus) is the god of beginnings and transitions, hence also of gates, doors, passages, endings and time. He is usually depicted as having two faces, since he looks to the future and to the past. The Romans named the month of January (Ianuarius) in his honor. Source K Kensington Runestone Place(s) where it is mentioned In this post by H Richard Loeb Look up the Kensington Runestone and the Vérendrye Runestone.﻿ Definition The Kensington Runestone is a 200-pound slab of greywacke covered in runes on its face and side, believed to have been created in modern times to claim that Scandinavian explorers reached the middle of North America in the 14th century. It was found in 1898 in the largely rural township of Solem, Douglas County, Minnesota, and named after the nearest settlement, Kensington. Almost all Runologists and experts in Scandinavian linguistics consider the runestone to be a hoax. Source N Namshub Place(s) where it is mentioned In this post by Flint Dille Yeah. We're getting an echo of the Namshub and the Bicameral mind.﻿ Definition It is the Sumerian word for an incantation or self-fulfilling prophecy. The concept was popularised by Neal Stephenson's novel Snow Crash. Source O Osiris (Myth) Place(s) where it is mentioned In this post by Flint Dille This is a tale to know. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Osiris_myth﻿ Definition The Osiris myth is the most elaborate and influential story in ancient Egyptian mythology. It concerns the murder of the god Osiris, a primeval king of Egypt, and its consequences. Osiris' murderer, his brother Set, usurps his throne. Meanwhile, Osiris' wife Isis restores her husband's body, allowing him to posthumously conceive a son with her. The remainder of the story focuses on Horus, the product of Isis and Osiris' union, who is first a vulnerable child protected by his mother and then becomes Set's rival for the throne. Their often violent conflict ends with Horus' triumph, which restores order to Egypt after Set's unrighteous reign and completes the process of Osiris' resurrection. The myth, with its complex symbolism, is integral to the Egyptian conceptions of kingship and succession, conflict between order and disorder and, especially, death and the afterlife. Source V Vérendrye Runestone Place(s) where it is mentioned In this post by H Richard Loeb Look up the Kensington Runestone and the Vérendrye Runestone.﻿ Definition The Vérendrye Runestone was allegedly found on an early expedition into the territory west of the Great Lakes by the French Canadian explorer Pierre Gaultier de Varennes et de La Vérendrye, in the 1730s. It is not mentioned in the official records of La Vérendrye's expeditions, but in 1749 he discussed it with visiting Swedish scientist Pehr Kalm, from whose writings virtually all information about the stone is taken. Source research, speculation, alexander_the_great

title: Geneva
text: Geneva Theories tmargo's Theory XM Sat Survey The Chrome WebGL app shows many geo-locations on a globe with corresponding magnitudes for each point. There are 3 surveys. The 1990 survey has points distributed throughout the whole globe. The 1995 & 2000 surveys have points only clustered around Geneva, Switzerland. Two CERN buildings are targeted (Bldg 39 & 41). These both have CERN hotels in them. The first point in the stream (which also has the highest magnitude) is a bit removed from the rest of the cluster. Could this be where Loeb is headed? Where Tycho is hiding? If anyone is near Geneva, please use Ingress and Field Trip to check these locations and report findings here.

title: Shapers
text: Shapers __Theories__ THERE IS NO EVIDENCE OR EVEN VAGUE SUGGESTIONS THAT SHAPERS ARE ALIENS. In fact, given recent clues, "The Enlightened" are head by Zeke Calvin and state they have always been present for much of humanity's history. JasonKaus's Theory Poster Text 1/1 shapers, like any other parasite always seek new hosts in order to expand their kingdom not sure exactly what to make of this it vaugely reminds me of the “locust analogy” from Independance Day 3/1 i am not qualified to testify about Shaper Theory but I know that some places are special. Great Cities are nearly always founded on places that are strong with a certain type of XM. This seems to confirm a connection between Shapers and XM, “Threats and Opportunities” refers to Shaper Portals it seems XM has direct correlation to the presence of portals. Also “Great Cities” being capitalized makes me think of religious termanology, but that may just be me. 4/5 what if they are already among us, but we don't realize it, because we don't think of them as life forms at all? And the key word here is “think”. A thought virus so, whatever Shapers are, they're so alien that we dont think of them as life? would we think of them as life if not for the “thought virus” Are the shapers responsible for the virus? again, the extremely alien nature makes me think of some sort of Eldritch Horror Poster 5 QR code We do not know its effects to be uniformly malevolent which the colloquial use of the term 'virus' implies - Many , in fact , most of the recipients of the Shaper influencer have reported beneficial effects - Bear in mind that I say most so the “thought virus is “shaper influence” what are the beneficial effects mentioned does this mean most people aren't under shaper influence? then is the Thought virus created by something else? if so then is “shaper influence” what allows people to realize the shapers are alive? if so? is Tycho's art skills one of these Effects? alright, so, Shapers are some sort of Entity which we can not understand because of a Thought virus, the nature of this virus is unclear. because “The Enlightened” google+ account photo is a very Chthulu like Squid, i have to assume the Shapers are indeed some form of Lovecraftian being, because of the mentions of advanced technology i offer the possibility that Shapers are a “Sufficiently Advanced” extradimentional race. like a monsterous version of the Observers from Fringe. //Notes by az971: Kenneth Grant, a leader of the organization Ordo Templi Orientis was the first to apply the Lovecraftian mythos to what is called practical/ceremonial magic. The basic thought was that any symbol and any being has power if you believe it does. But Lovecraft's beings weren't created out of thoughts. They existed in thoughts, and fed off of them. That's why they “required” worshippers, to maintain themselves. Similarly, there is a legend that monks brought a golem into reality/life simply by extreme concentration and meditation. More so, many comic book artists are occultists themselves. At least the major ones are. A more modern day and ecclectic concept is that of hyper sigils. They are symbols and thought forms that are created with a basic intent, but once given to the public they change and morph reality itself due to wills of everyone it “touches”. The comic The Invisibles is a hyper sigil. I believe there is in fact a symbiotic relationship, or once was a symbiotic relationship, between the shapers and man, but something is going horribly wrong. Great Cities are really just historical concentrations of people into sprawling metropolis. NYC, LA, Rome, Paris, etc, all have a “higher” origin. Enlightenment and other such terms are old metaphors used to describe the removal of ignorance and the gaining of wisdom and understanding. Illuminati means the enlightened ones, for example. It is also said that people each have a “perfect intellect” that they must discover, called a Daemon, or a Holy Guardian Angel, or other terms varying by culture. The key to true enlightenment lies in being able to communicate with this higher version of the self. Perhaps a relationship between the Daemon concept and the shapers? These beings are always said to guide, direct, instruct or intervene in a person's life once you gain access to them.// Foxed's idea relating to Shapers I believe that Shapers are creating Portals into our world (No use yet thought of) by manipulating artists. This is made a lot more obvious by listening to the 6th Hollis audio log posted where it is stated that the artist built a 26-foot statue made EXACTLY how the shapers wanted him to do it. This combined with the fact that we have evidence that some statues have high levels of XM leads me back to my original point. Notes by az971: Some key words that are related to similar IRL concepts: Merkaba, HGA, merkaba field points Ken Hikage's Malevolent Invader Hypothesis Shapers are unable to enter our dimension/Universe from theirs. They can only transmit data packets. The first set of data sent has been to artists and engineers so that they would build monuments as transdimensional gateways. The Shapers would have similar gateways in their dimension/Universe. Through these something larger can be sent. My guess is that their reality has become uninhabitable. They have caused "progress" throughout time in order to lay the groundwork for their invasion. Ken Hikage's Benevolent Patron Hypothesis Shapers are unable or unwilling to enter our plane of existence. From time immemorial they have watched us progress. As a compassionate group of entities they seek to guide us toward prosperity. The nodes they have influenced us building are fonts of inspiration both for the scientific minded and the creative. These nodes tap into a field we can neither detect or understand. __Faction Position on Shapers __ The Resistance on Shapers The Resistance wishes to prevent the Shapers from increasing their influence on humanity. Their reasoning behind this is that eventually all of humanity will become linked via this idea virus, turning our species into one of a hive mind. They argue that the Shapers are not the ones who grant ideas, but instead allow humanity to spread ideas more quickly, but also have some kind of nefarious purpose to their manipulation of humanity's creativity. The Shapers have always been "present" in another level of existence, but they seem to always want to come to our plane of existence, and are unable to do so without the help of a human meat suit... We must Resist! The Enlightened on Shapers The Enlighten see no harm in the Shapers. Evidence of the Shapers being present are evident throughout history, in every major artist and leader, having heard "whispers" from a "divine" source telling them to take a certain action or take a certain path. Shapers have been guiding humanity for centuries, and look around you. Everything has Shaper influence. We wish to increase this influence to launch us foward into a new age of human... Enlightenment!

title: Applications
text: Unanswered Questions Tycho Poster #4 - Weird image on top corner on the left side? What is CogniDyne Corporation? Where are these other videos of “suit-types” approaching Berkeley students? Day #1 > @NianticProject Twitter account: Other than CERN, are the other Twitter accounts that it is following relevant? Day #4 > ADA Circle “Eye” Image > Is there any significance/code in the image itself? (I know the “Battista Bellaso” metadata code has been solved. I’m talking about the actual image.) Day #4 > “Inspirare” audio clip > Who is the “madman”, why did he hang himself, and from what “installation”? Day #5 > Threats and Opportunities > DOCID > What’s with “321 123 ada” and the six upside-down 2’s? Day #7 > Chat Log: Retrieve the Phone > What are the other related URLs bought up by the NIA? Day #13 > Tech Audio 1 > Algorithm Document > What’s the purpose of the blue progress bar? Does the oddly chosen number for opacity level in the source code "opacity: 0.9896114053108829;" mean anything? Day #16 > Thought for Today > What does this mean: “If you... have an epiphany about... why Jarvis is talking through the [Ingress] app... Share it on social...”? Day #16 > Victor Kureze Video > Is there any significance to the video glitch showing Green/Red/Blue channels? (Potentially a small dimensional rift in which a different "channel" is causing interference with ours. Makes for a great example, actually. --InternalError) Since Day #21 > Calendar WOTD on the Investigation Board now links to TOTD instead. Why? Days #21, 24, 25 > “Very” is an odd word choice to abbreviate as “v.”? This annotation is seen in several places, including Dr. Kureze’s XM Presentation Slide #5, Nomad emails, and Eureka chat log. December 5 > why does the information about the two new agents say that the location of the bodies were unknown, despite a NIANTIC truck being spotted at the scene? Applications Given this is a Google sponsored ARG, there are several apps using Google APIs. These apps are geo-locative so here is a link to the global map we're keeping with the most important POIs.

title: start
text: This wiki is an unofficial community resource operated and updated by players. We are not affiliated with Google or NianticLabs. November 2012 -- Dec. 2012 -- Jan. 2013 -- Feb. 2013 -- Mar. 2013 -- Apr. 2013 -- May 2013 -- Jun. 2013 -- Jul. 2013 -- Aug. 2013 -- Sept. 2013 -- Oct. 2013 ---- In Nov. 2013 investigation moved to Google+. -- Jan. 2016 started new investigation site What is the Niantic Project? Investigation Ingress Anime - Agents, We can now report Fuji TV is the official partner of the upcoming Ingress anime. from Ingress Post INGRESS.REPORT - http://ingress.report/ - a site collecting stories from all facets of Ingress Operation Essex Media Archive - http://media.1331.nl/ - created by Alastair Gilfillan Ingress Report New Video Series Check this playlist Ingress Twitch Channel - https://www.twitch.tv/ingress Ingress Prime Where there was One Misty Hannah #TheMindPalace November Lima 1331 Hank Johnson's NOMAD: 13MAGNUS Reawakens Pt 3 Kodama Smiles #FateofThe13 Part 1 Devra EXOTIC Complete Video It's Time to Recruit (what's Ingress) video Playing Ingress (The basics of Ingress) video For the old intro video click here And for the old Ingresstigate check ep 1 ,ep 2 and ep 3 As our investigation spans a variety of different websites and media types, we have broken down our findings into several categories for organisational purposes. Some of the larger pieces have been further split into their own pages for better documentation. Check New to the Wiki, a quick beginners guide to how the wiki is set up and some of the items you can explore in the wiki. If you plan on editing the wiki, PLEASE visit this page to see how the wiki is set up. The main focus of this wiki is to simply collect the pieces and information associated with the Niantic/Ingress universe, it does not focus on analysis or summation of the information. The wiki is always looking for those wanting to help add information. In January of 2016 Henri Richard Loeb (AKA P. A. Chapeau) began a new investigation Site. Visit the site for the latest updates and information - Investigate: Ingress see the site's Detailed Dossier for more information. Latest Updates Last updated August 10, 2018 see archived updates at Updates Old From an Andrew Klug AMA post - Information regarding the affect of the two Camps Q2: Josh Stock - Is there a summary of what happened, storyline-wise, at Navarro and Kaltenberg? A2: According to a number of investigators present on the ground at the Epiphany Night events, several teams of RPE (Remote Participation Experiment) Agents ventured into three different Anomalous zones. The first zone took them to a future Camp Navarro -- where Antoine Smith was pursuing a Prime Object known capable of channeling XM across a Universe-threshold. The second zone led them to Schloss Kaltenberg in the year 1331 where -- amidst a bloody battle between Osiris Cultists and the fragmented remains of a Templar Knight order, a second Prime Object -- capable of locating specific Universe thresholds -- was being protected. Agents, having retrieved these two Prime Objects, were told by Hank Johnson that, in order to avert an XM crisis in our own universe, massive amounts of XM must be channeled into an XM sparse universe. To complete their mission, Agents remotely entered the Niantic Project facility in a universe codenamed ‘OSIRIS’ on the day of Oliver Lynton-Wolfe’s Power Cube test. Almost all groups of Agents were able to successfully channel XM into that universe, causing the Power Cube test to proceed as required. Given the low casualty rate on returning RPE Agents, Director Johnson classified the mission as successful. Working on a New Home Page of the wiki - anyone want to help? Please contact docwho2100 (docwho2100@gmail.com) or via hangouts. Working on a Cassandra Dossierto prepare for the upcoming Cassandra Prime Events in July, 2018 and August 2018 The second stage of the EXO5 anomaly is set for Dec 2, 2017 AN RPE event connected to Misty Hannah is being live streamed on the Ingress Twitch Channel September 9th. Why is there odd data in the EXIF of the latest #FindKlue image posted - Post by KoshTheRipper link to image with exif data an RPG is being introduced at the MAGNUS REAWAKENS event. Intel is being collected here Working on a What is a MAGNUS dossier - please help fill out this page. The MAGNUS REAWAKENS event is happening P. A. Any help is welcomed Operation Essex is a g+ group started by Dr. Edgar Allan Wright to uncover the truth about the Niantic Project and related. VIDEOS Acolyte (Roland Jarvis) Videos ADA Videos PAC Videos Klue Videos Hank Johnson Videos Devra Bognovich Videos Enoch Dalby Videos Roland Jarvis Videos Ben Jackland Videos Ingress Report Videos External Videos Niantic Videos Comic Con Videos VI Videos Cassandra Signal Obsessed Videos Misc Audio JAR #TuneIngress DOCUMENTS Chatlogs Mails Scripts and Stories News Leaked METIS ADA Briefs Books and Comics INGRESS Events and Resources Events / Anomalies Ingress Mission Days Missions Ingress passcodes Badges Inventory Useful Links Ingress Clues OTHER SOURCES Field Trip XM Sat Survey Google Plus Verum Inveniri Dead Drops Misc Although the nianticproject.com is no longer updated you can still find the posts on the original site. New information is released via assorted social media sites and H. Richard Loeb's Investigate Ingress site In an out-of-universe context, the organisation behind the leaks is NianticLabs, a division of Google previously responsible for the creation of Field Trip, a geo-aware "guide to the cool, hidden, and unique things in the world around you." Two weeks in to this ARG, NianticLabs released their second application, Ingress. This massively multiplayer augmented reality game sees players in two factions fighting for territorial control of the planet, focused around real-world monuments and landmarks designated as "portals". The Niantic Project ARG and Ingress serve as complements to each other in the full story behind the Niantic Project. For new players to Ingress we recommend Ingress Agent Field Guide Also come and chat with other players via the IRC channels on irc.irchighway.net. Discussion channel: Our primary IRC channel is located at irc.irchighway.net #niantic. Please try to keep the discussion in this channel on-topic. Investigation channel: Our puzzle-solving/investigation channel is irc.irchighway.net #niantic2. Verum Inveniri: The only official Niantic project IRC room. Used by the group Verum Inveniri mainly during their puzzles irc.irchighway.net #veruminveniri. Jojo work notes These pages don't directly list any investigative findings, but are rather an archive of resources that may prove useful to the investigation. title: tycho_magnus_archetypes
text: ARCHETYPAL VISIONS – 1 http://investigate.ingress.com/2017/05/05/archetypal-visions-1/ May 5, 2017 Some time ago, a series of images were uncovered from Agent Kodama’s recent briefings on #FateOfThe13. Operation Essex, of course, was first on the scene. It was, I believe, Essex Investigator Yik Sheng Lee who first extracted this series of images and began speculating that they may be representations of MAGNUS Archetypes by the famous comic artist Tycho. I stayed hands off for a bit — the provenance of the images was unknown to me and I had no evidence one way or another. I now do have reliable intelligence, however, that these images originated with Tycho — they are indeed his representations of MAGNUS Archetypes. I am working on gaining access to the full set. I don’t know when I’ll be able to pull that off. PAC ARCHETYPAL VISIONS – 2 http://investigate.ingress.com/2017/05/07/archetypal-visions-2/ May 7, 2017 Here is the next set of images I was able to obtain from a collection that I currently believe to by Tycho’s representation of MAGNUS archetypes… The first batch is here. PAC ARCHETYPAL VISIONS – 3 http://investigate.ingress.com/2017/05/09/archetypal-visions-3/ May 9, 2017 The third group of images showcasing Tycho’s representations of MAGNUS Archetypes… Part 1 can be found here, and part 2 here. PAC ARCHETYPAL VISIONS – 4 http://investigate.ingress.com/2017/05/12/archetypal-visions-4/ May 12, 2017 The fourth, and final, group of images showcasing Tycho’s representations of MAGNUS Archetypes… Part 1 can be found here, part 2 here and part 3 here. I have been unable to obtain any Tycho image representing the final known MAGNUS Archetype… I do not know if this is because such an image does not exist, or if there could be another reason… PAC

title: #Nominus
text: #Nominus As an apparent result of the end of Acess Dive 3 VI initiated the #Nominus deaddrops. These are 15 pieces of a script written by Andy Nominus. Each piece was located by images shared by VI of locations around the world. Also each piece has in the back a number in a sequence X/15 (example 01/15) that matches the number in the post and also a sequence of letters and numbers that seem that they could be used for a metapuzzle. A bit after the first post Misty posted the following "I've heard that more pages of that screenplay have dropped. While I find it fascinating to read an account of an event that I believed was unknown. Worries me a little. These are dangerous people, and you could get a girl killed. Remember the Magic Castle.﻿" Later she would post "Upon further thought, I think that the importance of getting the truth about #riphankjohnson out supercedes whatever threat to my safety might be involved. I can usually see them coming and I'm a survivor. So #operationessex and +Verum Inveniri let the truth out. Great detective work, by the way.﻿"" The Niantic Project would also post +Verum Inveniri claim to have obtained further documentation produced by Andy Nominus, the sensitive screenplay author who first revealed the Epiphany Night incident at the Niantic Project to us in detail. Early reports claim this document may shed critical light on +Hank Johnson. As an extra note VI changed their banner during the event Hidden Info Getting all the letters and numbers in order from the backs of the pieces you get artifact6so09fr To get the missing number the hint 8609 has to be used. This is a hint that revealed that all VI format passcodes last digit is a checsum digit. The formula for the last digit is length of keyword + first 3 numbers. Round up that result and then subtract from that value the result you had. In this case 8+6+0+9 = 23. Round up = 30 30-23 = 7 artifact6so09fr7 Piece 01 VI post Original Post Agents, We have obtained a document produced by Andy Nominus. Some tried to stop us from releasing this. You have come far by finishing the Access Dive. Some competed. Others collaborated, sharing their victories with those from the other faction. Now, you have a new challenge. It will take collaboration across factions and across the world to bring the pieces of this document together. Share a public post with the hashtag #nominus to receive an asset redemption code if you find a piece in your area. It's in your hands now. Find the pieces. You must bring this document to light. Good luck. VI +++ 01/15 #Ingress #NianticProject #RIPHankJohnson #nominus ﻿ Piece This was the portal Chief Wasatch Monument in Salt Lake City, UT Finder's post in the back - 01/15 8609_A Piece 02 VI post Original Post Piece This was in Virginia War Museum in Newport News,VA. ﻿ Finder's post In the back -
